title: Pink Kawaii Idol Lipstick Portrait
author: ねね*AIcreator
prompt: A highly detailed glossy anime idol portrait in a vertical composition, showing a cute teenage girl from the waist up in a dreamy pink kawaii aesthetic. She has {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} hair styled in a very long voluminous high ponytail with soft bangs and flowing curled strands, decorated with multiple small heart clips and crossed hairpins. Her eyes are large, sparkling, and vivid {argument name="eye color" default="emerald green"}, with star-like highlights, long lashes, and a slightly teary shine. She has a soft blush, tiny glossy lips, and an affectionate expression while applying {argument name="lipstick color" default="bright pink"} lipstick, holding the lipstick tube delicately with both hands near her mouth. She wears a frilly black-and-pink gothic lolita idol dress with lace, ribbons, bows, heart ornaments, and sparkling textures, plus 1 black lace bow headband with a pink jeweled heart, 3 visible hair accessories on her bangs, 1 pair of dangling heart earrings, and 1 black choker with a small heart charm. Surround the character with a glowing, glitter-filled, candy-pink background full of bokeh, sparkles, soft neon light effects, and idol-fan atmosphere. Add 5 glowing hand-drawn heart text bubbles in Japanese around her, reading: "かわいすぎてごめん…♡", "推してくれてありがとうっ♡", "ずーっとだいすきっ♡", "世界でいちばんの推しになってね…♡", and "ずっと一緒だよ？約束ね…♡". Include a small decorated photo card or poster of the same girl in the upper right background. Ultra-polished illustration, dense shimmer, romantic lighting, glossy highlights, intricate lace detail, soft-focus background, saturated pink palette, adorable idol poster feel.

title: 华尔街日报风格商业报纸头版
author: Flowith
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张从上方四分之三视角拍摄的照片级真实感报纸，折叠在深色木质书桌上，风格模仿 1980 年代至 2000 年代著名的美国商业日报。报纸具有清晰逼真的新闻纸纹理、细微的纸张褶皱、略显磨损的折叠边缘，温暖的晨光在页面上投射出对角线的窗影。报头占据顶部，以醒目的大号经典衬线体大写字母书写 THE WALL STREET DAILY.。其正下方是一条细长的页眉，包含小型财经报纸细节：“DOW JONES”、“News Corp”、日期行“MONDAY, APRIL 20, 2026 – VOL. CCLXXXV NO. 90”、“WSJ.com”、星级评分行以及价格“$5.00”。主导新闻位于中上方偏左，配有巨大的粗体衬线标题 Cook to Step Down as Apple CEO; Ternus Named Successor。下方是较小的衬线副标题：“Transition caps 15-year run; company pivots to AI-driven future”。添加一行小型大写字母署名，包含两位记者：“By Tim Higgins” 和 “And Joanna Stern”。主文填充关于蒂姆·库克卸任苹果首席执行官、约翰·特努斯继任、苹果增长、AI 战略及企业转型的密集且完全可读的多栏新闻正文；文字应读起来像地道的财经新闻，而非占位符乱码。在主新闻右侧，放置一张黑白雕版点刻风格的男性高管肖像，身穿衬衫和夹克，居中于矩形图像区域；面部被眼睛和鼻梁上方的一块浅灰色遮挡方块部分遮盖，营造出一种现代讽刺效果。在右上角，包含一个标题为“What’s New”的侧边栏框，内设 2 个小节标题：“Business & Finance” 和 “World-Wide”，每个标题后跟随小型衬线字体的要点简报；“Business & Finance” 下包含 3 个要点，“World-Wide” 下包含 4 个要点，所有内容均需排版完整且清晰可读。在主新闻下方，添加一条横跨页面的二级通栏文章，标题为“Silicon Valley Braces for New Chapter in AI Arms Race”，署名为“By Liz Hoffman”，并配有几段关于大型科技公司、初创企业、OpenAI、Google、Meta、芯片、平台及 AI 竞争的短文。在此中下区域右侧，插入一个紧凑的市场表格，标题为“Markets”，包含 4 行标签，分别为“DOW JONES”、“S&P 500”、“NASDAQ” 和 “10-YR. TREASURY”，并设有指数/数值/变动/百分比列，采用逼真的报纸表格格式及真实数值。在头版底部，包含 3 个预告框：左侧框标签为“Heard on the Street”，标题为“Why Investors Are Rethinking Big Tech”，页码标记为“B12”；中间框标签为“Markets”，标题为“Earnings Season Lifts Stocks Despite Rate Uncertainty”，页码标记为“B1”；右侧框标签为“Inside”，标题为“Private Credit Sees Inflow Surge as Yields Stay High”，页码标记为“B14”。确保所有排版整洁、锐利、完全可读，并以地道的报纸网格布局保持一致对齐，栏间使用细线分隔，文字两端对齐，采用经典衬线字体，并具有逼真的印刷对比度。报纸在桌面上略微顺时针旋转。在环境中，右上角放置一个装有黑咖啡的白色陶瓷杯，报纸右下边缘附近放着一副深色边框眼镜。左上角包含一个深色圆柱形物体的裁剪边缘，看起来像是相机镜头或平底杯。整体氛围：高端编辑样机头版，严肃的商业新闻美学，可信的印刷摄影感，超高细节，自然阴影，高分辨率。

title: Santorini Luxury Dress Portrait
author: Ed
prompt: A glamorous travel-fashion portrait of a {argument name="woman" default="blonde woman"} seated on a sunlit stone ledge overlooking the caldera in Santorini, Greece, with whitewashed cliffside buildings descending toward a deep blue sea and rugged volcanic islands in the distance. She wears a flowing ivory halter dress with a very deep plunging neckline, side cutouts, a gathered waist with a circular ring detail, and soft pleated fabric draped across her lap. Her hair is long, wavy, and {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"}, styled loose over her shoulders. Add layered delicate necklaces including a small pendant and a silver cross, plus a bracelet or watch on one wrist. Place a classic white Greek church with a bright {argument name="dome color" default="blue"} dome in the upper right background, and frame the right side of the image with vivid {argument name="flower color" default="magenta pink"} bougainvillea in full bloom. Lighting is bright Mediterranean midday sun with crisp highlights, soft skin glow, and gentle depth of field that keeps the woman sharp while the background architecture and sea are slightly softened. Composition is vertical, elegant and aspirational, with the woman centered slightly right, torso visible down to the flowing skirt, scenic coastline stretching across the left half of the frame. Add small black text in the top-left corner reading {argument name="corner text" default="GPT V2"}. Photorealistic luxury vacation aesthetic, high detail, natural colors, editorial Instagram travel vibe.

title: Cute Four-Panel Cat Jealousy Comic
author: Maoku
prompt: A cute hand-drawn four-panel comic in a soft, warm, slice-of-life style on a light cream background with thick black panel borders and slightly textured paper grain. Use simple rounded cartoon cat anatomy, expressive faces, clean black outlines, muted natural colors, and a gentle manga-like presentation. In the top-left panel, show 2 cats: a brown tabby cat with dark stripes and white muzzle sitting with eyes closed, looking pleased, while a mostly white cat with dark brown patches on the head stands beside it and affectionately licks the tabby's cheek; add 2 small black musical notes above them to suggest happy grooming. In the top-right panel, show the white-and-brown patched cat in the foreground looking toward a small calico kitten standing to the right; include a speech bubble containing the Japanese text "めい" above the kitten. In the bottom-left panel, show 3 cats together: the brown tabby on the left with a surprised or blank expression, the white patched cat on the right looking cheerful, and the small calico kitten centered in front between them, looking up. In the bottom-right panel, show a close-up of the brown tabby cat alone, facing forward with narrowed yellow-green eyes and an angry, jealous expression; add 2 short emphasis lines near the face and 1 small puff-shaped anger symbol to the right. Keep the tone cozy and comedic, with the visual joke that the tabby was happy being groomed until the new kitten appears. Use flat colors, minimal shading, and a charming Japanese webcomic feel.

title: Moody Censored Indoor Selfie Portrait
author: MathMedix
prompt: A realistic indoor selfie-style portrait of a young East Asian man from the chest up, seated near a large modern window in a high-rise apartment or hotel room during soft daylight. He has {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair, thick and slightly tousled with a center part and soft volume over the forehead and sides. His build appears slim, with a long neck and smooth light skin. He wears a {argument name="shirt color" default="black"} button-up shirt made of matte cotton or poplin, slightly oversized, with the top several buttons undone to create a deep open collar and relaxed, casual styling. The camera is held close in a natural selfie angle, portrait orientation, framing the shoulders, chest, neck, and head. His face is fully obscured by a large centered rectangular blur or mosaic censor block, while the ears, jawline edges, neck, and hair remain visible. The mood is understated, moody, and elegant, with muted neutral colors, soft window light from the right side, gentle shadows, and a candid social-media selfie feeling. Background details include 1 beige wall section on the left, 1 small dark wall control panel, 1 vertical metallic trim or lamp edge, and 2 tall dark-framed window panels on the right with a faint out-of-focus city skyline outside. Photorealistic smartphone photo, clean modern interior, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, subtle contrast, no smile visible because of the censor block, minimal editing, stylish and believable personal selfie.

title: Minimal Pelican Riding Bicycle
author: Justin Schroeder
prompt: A minimalist vector-style illustration on a flat light gray background showing a pelican riding a bicycle, drawn from simple geometric shapes with thick dark charcoal outlines. The composition is wide and centered, with the bicycle occupying the lower two-thirds of the image and the bird’s head floating slightly above and forward of the handlebars in a deliberately abstract, diagram-like way. The bicycle is a simple black road-bike silhouette in side view with exactly 2 large wheels, each with a thick outer rim and exactly 4 visible spoke lines forming a cross, a straight horizontal ground line beneath both wheels, a triangular frame, a short black saddle, and simplified crank and pedal details near the rear of the frame. The pelican is constructed from clean abstract pieces: a white rounded head with a small black circular eye, a long open beak pointing left made of 2 parts with an upper orange triangular section and a lower pale pink pouch section, a short dark curve on top of the head, a small separate white oval neck/body connector, a larger white rounded body positioned over the bike, and a single white wing-like shape angled upward over the back. Add exactly 2 orange leg shapes, long narrow rectangles leaning downward from the body toward the bicycle frame, suggesting the bird is pedaling. Keep the forms intentionally sparse and slightly surreal, like a logo test or simple code-editor doodle, with no shading, no gradients, no textures, no text, and lots of negative space.

title: Minimalist Fashion Moodboard Outfit
author: 虎小象
prompt: A clean editorial fashion collage on a light gray-white background with a thin black rectangular border, styled like a minimalist magazine outfit board. Center the outfit as a flat lay style composition with 5 visible fashion items: a bright {argument name="jacket color" default="crimson red"} cropped zip-front jacket with a pointed collar and elastic hem placed slightly left and layered on top; underneath it, a fitted {argument name="top color" default="white"} long-sleeve crew-neck knit top visible at the shoulders and sleeves; below, a voluminous mid-calf A-line skirt in off-white with evenly spaced large black polka dots; at lower left, a structured small black handbag with short top handles and a subtle glossy crocodile texture; at lower right, one pair of black square-toe Mary Jane flats with wide straps and silver grommet-ring hardware. Add oversized very pale gray background typography reading {argument name="background brand text" default="MANGO"} stretched large across the middle behind the clothing. Place smaller black fashion-brand wordmarks around the layout: {argument name="top right logo" default="MANGO"} near the upper right of the outfit, "Stradivarius" near the handbag and again near the shoes, and "DOLCE & GABBANA" at the lower left near the skirt hem. The composition should feel balanced, chic, and contemporary, with soft studio lighting, no shadows or only faint soft shadows, crisp cutout edges, and a polished social-media fashion moodboard aesthetic.

title: Luxury Indoor Mirror Selfie Portrait
author: Danna R.
prompt: A realistic indoor mirror selfie of a slender glamorous young woman standing in a softly lit upscale living room or hotel suite, photographed vertically from head to below the knees. She wears a form-fitting cream or ivory bodycon midi dress with elegant draping and ruching, featuring an asymmetrical neckline with 1 shoulder strap crossing diagonally over the chest and leaving the other shoulder bare. Her hair is long, dark brown, softly wavy, and parted near the center, falling over both shoulders. She holds a smartphone in her right hand in front of her face, partially covering it, with the phone angled toward a wall mirror; the phone has a dark case with a red cloud pattern. Her left arm hangs naturally by her side. Add subtle jewelry: 1 thin necklace with a small pendant, 1 silver bracelet or bangle on the right wrist, and rings on the fingers of the hand holding the phone. Emphasize a realistic feminine silhouette, smooth skin, soft warm ambient lighting, and polished editorial social-media style photography. The background should include 1 beige sofa behind her, 1 brown leather handbag resting on the right side of the sofa, 1 textured stone or concrete accent wall behind the mirror area, and a warm hallway on the left with 2 framed wall artworks visible. Use natural indoor shadows, refined skin texture, realistic fabric folds and compression around the waist and hips, luxury apartment aesthetic, clean composition, and high detail.

title: Realistic McDonald's Selfie Portrait
author: AB Kuai.Dong
prompt: A highly realistic casual smartphone selfie taken indoors at a McDonald's restaurant in Asia, framed as a chest-up portrait of a young man seated at a table. The camera is held slightly above table height at arm’s length, creating a natural front-facing selfie perspective with one forearm extending toward the lens. The subject wears a black T-shirt with a small white Tesla logo on the left chest, has short straight black hair, thin dark eyeglass frames partly visible, and rests one hand lightly against his chin in a relaxed pose. His face is fully obscured by a large solid rectangular blur block in the center, preserving privacy while leaving the hair, ears, jawline edges, and glasses arms visible. In the lower left foreground sits 1 white McDonald's paper drink cup with a lid and a white straw, cropped by the frame. The background shows the restaurant counter area with warm ambient lighting, 1 large red wall panel on the left featuring the yellow McDonald's arches and the white slogan “i’m lovin’ it” with Chinese text below, 4 illuminated digital menu boards across the top displaying burgers, fries, combo meals, prices, and Chinese text, plus 2 people in the background near the counter, one facing away with a backpack and another partially visible behind the register. Use natural color balance, slight indoor grain, realistic reflections, shallow to moderate depth of field, and the candid look of an unstaged social media snapshot.

title: Apple macOS 重新设计宣传样机
author: doanbactam
prompt: 一张精致的 Apple 风格 macOS 宣传桌面样机，以全屏截图形式呈现。壁纸采用柔和的淡彩晨曦风格，描绘了淡桃色与薰衣草色天空下层叠的紫蓝色连绵山丘。顶部中央是一个巨大的极简主义标题“macOS”，下方副标题为“Redesigned.”，再下方是一行较小的文字：“More clarity. More focus. More you.”。顶部系统菜单栏横跨整个屏幕：左侧依次为 Apple 图标、Finder、文件、编辑、显示、前往、窗口、帮助；右侧为 Wi‑Fi、电池、搜索、彩色用户图标以及日期时间“6 月 10 日周一 上午 9:41”。左侧垂直堆叠 4 个半透明圆角小组件：一个显示“Sonoma, CA”、“65°”、“晴天”、最高/最低气温“H:72° L:55°”以及上午 10 点至下午 3 点每小时气温的天气小组件；一个显示“Design Review”和“Lunch with Sophie”及其时间的“接下来”日程小组件；一个显示“勿扰模式”及“开启至上午 10:00”的“专注”小组件；以及一个包含“Website redesign”笔记和时间“下午 3:30”的“备忘录”小组件。在左中前景处放置一个带有圆角和轻盈磨砂界面的 Finder 窗口，标题为“iCloud Drive”。左侧边栏包含 10 个项目：个人收藏包含“隔空投送”、“最近使用”、“应用程序”、“桌面”、“文稿”、“下载”6 个项目；iCloud 包含“iCloud Drive”和“共享”2 个项目；位置包含“Macintosh HD”1 个项目。Finder 主区域以网格形式显示 8 个文件：顶行是标记为“Work”、“Personal”、“Projects”、“Presentations”的 4 个文件夹，底行是标记为“Brand Guidelines.pdf”、“Project Brief.docx”、“Research.png”、“Moodboard.key”的 4 个文档。标题栏包含标准的 macOS 交通灯窗口按钮及小型视图/搜索控件。右侧重叠一个三栏布局的“邮件”应用窗口。左侧邮件列表栏标题为“收件箱”，显示“1237 封邮件”及 5 条可见的发件人/邮件摘要：“Antonio Manriquez”的“Design updates”、“Jenny Court”的“Re: Team lunch”、“Heather Lee”的“Q3 Planning”、“Nisha Kumar”的“Re: Feedback”以及“Simon Pickford”的“Offsite ideas”。阅读窗格显示选中的 Antonio Manriquez 发给你的邮件，主题为“Design updates”，正文内容关于新功能的附件样机，并附有一个标记为“Mockups.zip”和“12.4 MB”的文件附件卡片。采用简洁的 SF Pro 风格字体、微妙的阴影、半透明的玻璃拟态面板、柔和的环境光以及高端的 Apple Keynote 美学。底部中央包含一个光泽半透明的 macOS 程序坞，内含 15 个图标：Finder、启动台、Safari、信息、邮件、显示“6 月 10 日”的日历、照片、备忘录、提醒事项、TV、音乐、新闻、App Store、系统设置和废纸篓。整体构图平衡、通透、写实且高度精致，宛如 Apple 官方发布的 macOS 重新设计公告图。

title: Brainrot 阶梯教室投影仪
author: AIxHunter
prompt: A realistic photograph taken from the audience in a dimly lit university lecture hall, looking over the backs of the heads of three students in the foreground towards a large projector screen. The projector screen displays a layout split into three distinct vertical panels. The left panel shows vertical {argument name="left game" default="Subway Surfers gameplay"}, featuring a character running on train tracks collecting gold coins with UI elements like a score of "001022". The wide center panel displays an academic presentation slide titled "{argument name="slide topic" default="9.3: Infinite Geometric Series"}". The slide contains math text: "Example 3: Find the sum of the infinite geometric series. 1/3 - 1/9 + 1/27 - 1/81 + ... Solution: The series is geometric with a = 1/3 and r = -1/3. Since |r| < 1, the infinite geometric series converges. S = a / (1 - r) = (1/3) / (1 - (-1/3)) = (1/3) / (4/3) = 1/4. The sum of the series is 1/4." The slide footer reads "{argument name="professor name" default="Dr. Larson"}", "{argument name="course name" default="Calculus II"}", "11/14/2024", and "7 / 35". The right panel shows vertical {argument name="right game" default="Minecraft parkour gameplay"}, featuring floating wooden blocks over a grassy landscape with a TikTok watermark at the bottom right. The room has a drop ceiling and blackboards visible behind the screen edges.

title: 科技主题演讲演示 Slides
author: Yousef Rol
prompt: A photograph of a tech keynote presentation. A bald man with glasses, wearing a dark blue sweater and jeans, stands on a stage to the left, smiling and pointing with both index fingers at a large presentation screen behind him. The screen displays a slide with a light blue background. At the top left is a small teal pill-shaped badge reading "NEW DATA". Below it, the main headline reads "{argument name="headline" default="Microsoft Edge is the #1 browser to download Google Chrome"}", with "#1" highlighted in blue. A subheadline reads "% of Google Chrome downloads that started from another browser". Below this is a bar chart with three bars. The first bar is tall and blue, labeled "38.6%" above it, with the Microsoft Edge logo and text "Microsoft Edge" below it. The second bar is shorter and gray, labeled "17.2%" above it, with the Mozilla Firefox logo and text "Mozilla Firefox" below it. The third bar is the shortest and gray, labeled "13.0%" above it, with the Apple Safari logo and text "Apple Safari" below it. At the bottom left of the slide, small text reads "Source: Microsoft internal analysis of Google Chrome download referrals Cohort: Windows 10 and 11, Worldwide, Jan - March 2024". To the left of the screen, a wooden panel features the Microsoft logo (four colored squares). The backs of audience members' heads are visible in the foreground at the bottom.

title: 动漫 VTuber 直播界面覆盖图
author: しーげっちは自分で描いた絵を動かしたい
prompt: An anime-style illustration of a cute {argument name="animal type" default="tanuki"}-girl VTuber streaming live. She has dark skin, short white bob hair, fluffy brown animal ears, large brown eyes, and a fluffy striped tail. She is smiling happily with her mouth open and waving at the camera with her left hand. She is wearing a black and white maid outfit with frilly white trim, a white apron with a light green waistband, and a green ribbon choker with a golden bell. The background is a cozy, softly lit room with bokeh effects, featuring a glowing pink neon heart on the wall. To her left is a professional black studio microphone on a stand, and behind it is a computer monitor displaying a pink chat interface. A small {argument name="plushie type" default="tanuki plushie"} sits on the desk next to the microphone. The image features a streaming UI overlay with 3 distinct components: a red badge in the top left reading "{argument name="top left badge" default="LIVE"}", a pink badge in the top right reading "{argument name="top right badge" default="ON AIR"}" with a heart icon, and a semi-transparent dark grey chat box in the bottom left containing exactly 3 messages. The first message has a green heart and the text "Cute!", the second has a green heart and the text "Warm~!", and the third says "{argument name="chat message" default="Love"}" with two green hearts.

title: 请围绕【主题】自动生成一张顶级概念海报 / 信息图式电影海报。
author: A9Quant
prompt:
请围绕【主题】自动生成一张顶级概念海报 / 信息图式电影海报。

唯一输入变量只有：
【主题】：__中国历史上的皇帝排名_         

要求 AI 根据这个主题，自动推导并统一设计以下全部视觉系统，不需要我额外指定：
- 核心主体（可以自动判断更适合人物、产品、建筑、器物、符号、场景或抽象意象）
- 底部支撑结构
- 上方悬浮符号或精神象征
- 场景包裹元素
- 隐喻系统
- 色彩层级
- 材质对比
- 光影逻辑
- 标题、副标题、辅助文案
- 品牌感与高级感表达方式

最终画面必须是：
一张震撼、精密、统一、电影级、超高细节、可用于高端印刷的概念主视觉海报。

【总风格】
超写实 3D 商业 CGI 渲染，融合电影级布光、奢侈品视觉语言、未来感概念设计与史诗级构图。画面必须具有“唯一主视觉核心”，不能杂乱，不能像拼贴，不能像普通电商海报。

【自动推导规则】
AI 必须依据【主题】自动决定最合适的：
1. 核心视觉隐喻
2. 主体类型与姿态
3. 支撑结构形式
4. 悬浮元素形式
5. 场景外壳与空间氛围
6. 主色、辅色、强调色
7. 材质组合
8. 文字气质与版式风格

例如：
- 如果主题偏权力、秩序、资本、统治，则自动偏向王座、冠冕、机械、神殿、红幕、金属、权力结构
- 如果主题偏科技、AI、芯片、未来，则自动偏向机械结构、能量核心、光束、深色金属、全息感
- 如果主题偏奢侈品、高定、稀缺、收藏，则自动偏向珠宝、镜面材质、黑金体系、展台、博物馆式布光
- 如果主题偏人物、IP、角色，则自动以人物为主视觉核心，并自动匹配对应世界观与象征系统
- 如果主题偏城市、文明、史诗、命运，则自动转化为宏大叙事型空间结构与仪式感场景

【构图规则】
- 绝对高级感
- 强烈中心秩序，整体统一
- 允许中轴对称或接近中轴的史诗级构图
- 视觉重力明确，从上到下形成清晰的层级落点
- 边缘负空间干净、克制、有呼吸感
- 不允许无意义装饰，不允许风格污染，不允许多个系统互相打架

【视觉质量】
- 超高细节
- 体积光清晰
- 材质真实
- 反射、折射、阴影、雾气、景深自然
- 每个元素都像经过工业级视觉总监审美控制
- 整体达到高端品牌 campaign key visual / luxury invitation poster / conceptual editorial poster 水准

【排版系统】
- 整体为 90% 视觉，10% 文字
- AI 根据【主题】自动生成最匹配的主标题和副标题
- 标题必须简洁、锋利、有气势
- 文案分布在安全负空间内，不压主体
- 若主题适合中文，则优先生成中文标题；若主题更适合英文，则自动生成英文标题；也可中英结合，但必须统一高级
- 文字必须尽量少而准，不要堆字

【署名要求】
在画面底部角落自然加入作者署名：
@a9quant
署名要小，但清晰、精致、高级，不喧宾夺主，像顶级视觉作品中的正式作者落款。

【输出要求】
输出为单张统一构图海报。
自动根据【主题】完成全部视觉决策。
画面必须具备史诗感、秩序感、控制力、仪式感、商业完成度。
最大细节密度，超清，电影级，印刷级，高端成片质感。

title: 讽刺风格西班牙体育报纸头版
author: Germán Huertas
prompt: 一张设计成小报封面的讽刺风格西班牙体育报纸头版，全画幅且完全正面视角，印在略显陈旧的米白色新闻纸上，带有细腻的纸张纹理、淡淡的污渍和细窄的黑色边框。报头顶部横跨一条亮黄色横幅，印有巨大的红色“SPORT”标志。右上角包含 1 个小型采访推广框，内含一名足球运动员的头像，以及西班牙语文本块：“ENTREVISTA CUBARSÍ ‘ESTOY PARA COSAS GRANDES’”。在报头下方，添加一条带有粗体黑色文字“EXCLUSIVA MUNDIAL”的黄色长条，并配有一个红色小闪电图标。主标题以巨大的黑色压缩大写字母占据页面核心位置，分为 2 行：“LAMILE FICHA POR LA PEÑA DEL BINGO”。在其下方，添加斜体黑色西班牙语副标题：“El crack pide dorsal el 10 y bocadillo de calamares en el contrato”。主照片占据页面左中及中下部：一名年轻足球运动员背影为主，身穿蓝红条纹的巴塞罗那主场球衣，球衣上印有大号黄色字母“LAMILE”和数字“10”，站在充满纸屑、强光、模糊球迷及人群的庆祝球场场景中。他手持或展示着一张巨大的宾果游戏项目，顶部写有“BINGO”，底部写有“BINGO!”。在右侧，创建一个包含 4 个堆叠内容块的垂直侧边栏：第一部分是一张盘中鱿鱼三明治的照片，配文“El motivo del fichaje”；第二部分是一个红色信息框，列出 3 条幽默的转会事实，文字为黄色和白色，内容为：“EDAD: muy joven”、“FICHAJE: 4 cartones”以及“CLÁUSULA: una partida de parchís”；第三部分是一个引语栏，包含 3 个堆叠的小项目，每个项目都有一个小肖像和西班牙语说明：“XAVI: ‘No me lo esperaba, pero respeto’”、“LAPORTA: ‘Renegociaremos en el próximo bingo’”以及“EL VESTUARIO: Le preparan línea y bingo de bienvenida”；第四部分是底部的一个小型赛车预告，配有车手图像和文字“FÓRMULA 1 ALONSO SUEÑA CON EL PODIO EN YEDA”。沿底部长条，包含 3 个小型预告面板：1 名手持奖杯的女足运动员，配文“CHAMPIONS FEMENINA LA REINA AITANA QUIERE OTRA CORONA”；1 个篮球面板，包含两名巴萨球员，配文“BÁSQUET EL BARÇA, A UN PAS DE LA FINAL FOUR”；以及已整合在右边缘的 F1 赛车预告面板。在报头左下方添加微小的西班牙语报纸元数据，包括期号、日期和价格，例如“Nº 16.743 MIÉRCOLES 22 DE ABRIL DE 2026 2,00 EUROS”。整体风格应为超写实的印刷报纸封面摄影和编辑排版，具备地道的杂志排版、强烈的黑色标题、饱和的体育照片色彩、喜剧性的转会传闻恶搞基调，以及天衣无缝且可信的印刷设计。

At the top center, a large, bold 3D logo reads "{argument name="game title" default="MINECRAFT 2"}". The scene features a {argument name="environment" default="lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background"}. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a {argument name="mob 1" default="blocky green creeper"} stands on the grass, while a {argument name="mob 2" default="blocky brown wolf"} stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a {argument name="held item" default="pixelated blue diamond sword"} in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.

title: Opulent Autumn Empress at Sunset
author: AIおじさん
prompt: A hyper-luxurious fantasy portrait of an elegant woman in side profile, centered slightly left, wearing an extravagant autumn headdress and robe made of red maple leaves, chrysanthemum-like flowers, gold filigree, gemstones, crystal pendants, and translucent stained-glass ornamentation. Her long dark hair falls over her shoulder, and her face is mostly obscured by shadow and angle, creating a mysterious, idealized look. Surround her with large sweeping circular frames and curved ribbons of transparent amber, ruby, and orange glass, embedded with faceted jewels and reflective crystal droplets. Fill the scene with exactly 9 clearly visible floating maple leaves drifting through the air. Set the background as a glowing mountain valley at sunset with the sun low on the horizon, warm golden rays, distant peaks, autumn forest, and a reflective river below. The entire image should be drenched in fiery orange, copper, gold, and scarlet tones, with extreme visual richness, dazzling highlights, dense layered detail, sparkling bokeh, cinematic backlighting, and an intentionally intense, eye-searing level of ornate beauty. Ultra-detailed, maximalist, ethereal, radiant, fantasy couture, glossy textures, jewel-like lighting, wide cinematic composition.

title: 从线框图到企业网页横幅
author: KAWAI
prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as a wireframe layout, generate a polished, professional corporate web banner ad for an AI sales tool. Use a clean blue, white, and orange color palette. Transform the sketched character into a photorealistic image of 2 smiling Japanese business professionals (a man and a woman in suits) looking at a silver laptop in a bright office. In the top left, add a logo for {argument name="brand name" default="KAWAISALES"} with a small tagline 'AIを活用した新しい営業支援ツール'. Map the wireframe's text bubbles as follows: replace the top bubble with a white oval containing the blue text {argument name="main copy" default="その営業、AIで「飛躍」しませんか？"}; replace the middle bubble with {argument name="sub copy" default="リード獲得からクロージングまでAIがあなたの営業活動を強力サポート！"}. Replace the bottom CTA box with a bright orange pill-shaped button reading {argument name="cta text" default="今すぐ 無料デモを体験する >"}. In the lower-right center, add a blue 3D-style bar chart with an upward arrow, accompanied by a target icon showing 3 user silhouettes and a white UI card with 4 checkmarked bullet points. Finally, add a white panel in the bottom left containing exactly 3 blue line-art icons (a clock, a rising chart, and a laptop) with short captions below each.

title: Censored Point-Cloud Portrait
author: Harshith
prompt: A minimalist monochrome portrait made entirely from millions of tiny white point-cloud dots on a pitch-black background, showing 1 adult man from the chest up in a formal dark blazer and light collared dress shirt. The subject is centered slightly to the right, facing forward with a subtle three-quarter turn, with neatly combed short hair and one visible ear sharply defined by dense lidar-like particles. Render the figure as raw 3D scan data mixed with topological contour logic: ultra-dense stippling, precise geometric dot placement, faint isoline structure, and clean depth shaping across the hair, jacket lapels, collar, neck, and shoulders. Keep the face intentionally obscured by 1 large vertical rectangular censor block in dark gray to black, perfectly centered over the facial area from forehead to below the nose, creating a stark privacy-mask effect. Use matte texture, crisp edges, sharp focus, high contrast, no glow, no bloom, no neon, no fog, no motion blur, no chromatic aberration, no painterly strokes. Add 1 small four-point sparkle icon in light gray in the bottom-right corner. The overall image should feel mathematical, forensic, and futuristic, like a high-resolution lidar scan portrait in 8k.

title: 战国 vs 三国跨界海报
author: 蛍川-ホタルガワ-
prompt:
提示词翻译前一张极具戏剧性、超精细的竖版动漫主视觉海报，展示了日本战国时代与中国三国时代之间的跨界战争，画面被一道发光的垂直光束精确地从中间一分为二。左半部分以深红、洋红、余烬橙和樱花粉为主题，代表 日本战国；右半部分以翡翠绿、青色、蓝绿色、金色和风暴蓝为主题，代表 中国三国。画面中央，巨大的垂直日文书法写着 时空交错，宿命碰撞。。构图紧凑、充满电影感且对称，如同高端游戏或电影的跨界海报，伴有无数火花、花瓣、发光粒子、动态光影以及层叠的背景建筑。

在左侧，描绘 4 位风格鲜明的战国主题武士。左上方，一位神情严峻的武士大名，身着饰有金边的华丽黑红铠甲，长发高束，随风飘动，以强有力的上半身肖像面向内侧；身后是樱花、旗帜和点缀着霓虹洋红色高光的层叠日式城堡。左中部，展示 1 位久经沙场、银发狂野、身着厚重层叠铠甲且目光凶狠的老将，半隐于堡垒城市景观中。左下方，展示 1 位身着深红铠甲、向前突刺的勇猛武士，衣摆飞扬，头戴鹿角状头盔，铠甲呈现动态的红黑配色。左下角前景，展示 1 位身着恶魔武士铠甲、头戴新月形头盔饰物、双眼闪烁红光的霸气剑客，斜握武士刀，周围环绕着余烬与花瓣。左上边缘附近的垂直旗帜上显示日文文本“日本战国”。

在右侧，描绘 4 位风格鲜明的三国主题英雄。右上方，展示 1 位身着精致蓝黑金配色礼仪铠甲、头戴高冠的尊贵战略家/帝王形象，以半身侧面像面向内侧；身后升起一条由水、云和光构成的发光灵龙。右中部，展示 1 位长须绿袍、头戴高冠、身着札甲的将军，神情庄重英勇，背景是霓虹灯点缀的城市建筑和旋转的魔法能量。右中下方，展示 1 位手持羽扇、身着层叠长袍并佩戴金饰的优雅谋士，神态冷静且深谋远虑。右下边缘，展示 1 位表情凶猛、发丝飞扬的咆哮武将。右下角前景，将一位身着绿金铠甲的英雄作为核心人物，他向观众伸出闪烁着翡翠绿光芒的宝剑，长袍飘逸，发光的能量丝带缠绕在剑刃周围。右上边缘附近的垂直旗帜上显示中文文本“中国三国”。

将东亚历史战争美学与未来派赛博朋克大都市元素融合：左侧是日式宝塔和堡垒，两侧均有霓虹摩天大楼和闪烁的城市灯光，天空中可见飞行堡垒的剪影和远处的空中战舰，上方则是魔法闪电、烟雾和风暴云。天空颜色从左侧的日落紫红过渡到右侧的风暴青绿色和银色。采用超精细的绘画风动漫插画，展现复杂的铠甲纹理、金属反射、体积光、高对比度、史诗般的规模和强烈的氛围。

在底部，添加巨大的风格化标题字体：左侧是巨大的火红色汉字“战国”，下方标注罗马音“SENGOKU”；中间是金属质感的金色“VS”；右侧是巨大的翡翠色发光汉字“三国”，下方标注罗马音“SANGOKU”。在下方，添加一行较小的居中副标题“SENGOKU VS SANGOKU”，并在其下方添加日文标语：跨越时空，英雄们的战斗即将开始。。海报布局，精致的商业宣传艺术，细节极其丰富，视觉冲击力强，具有收藏级的海报美感。

Behind her, a young man with black hair wearing an {argument name="male outfit" default="ornate black coat with red accents and silver chains"} stands facing away, looking back over his shoulder melancholically. They are on a balcony overlooking a {argument name="background setting" default="gothic fantasy castle city at dusk"}, with white petals scattering in the wind. The image features prominent, elegant Japanese typography. The large main title reads "{argument name="main title" default="善人をやめた悪役貴公子は、白薔薇の聖女を遠ざける"}" in stylized fonts with gold and blue gradients. A vertical catchphrase on the left reads "{argument name="left catchphrase" default="世界を守るため、俺はもっと悪になる。"}" and another on the right reads "世界を敵に回しても、あなたの隣にいたい。". Additional text at the bottom includes author credits and a publisher logo. The overall mood is dramatic and romantic with dynamic lighting.

title: 动漫恐怖游戏缩略图合成

Below the logo, in the lower center, is a {argument name="central figure" default="dark silhouette of a person sitting at a desk"} facing a glowing pink computer monitor in a dark room. The background is divided into 4 corner sections separated by torn paper edges, each containing a portrait of an anime girl in a school uniform. The top left corner shows a girl with long brown hair and a white bow smiling; the top right corner shows a girl with long dark purple hair looking sad; the bottom left corner shows a girl with short pink hair looking upset; and the bottom right corner shows a girl with short coral hair and a red bow smiling. Floating in the dark space between the characters and the central figure are exactly 3 large white question marks and 4 pieces of lined paper with blurry writing. title: 电影级中美洲战士肖像
author: nazca alwave
prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed portrait of a muscular {argument name="warrior culture" default="Mesoamerican"} warrior standing proudly. He wears an elaborate headdress adorned with {argument name="headdress feathers" default="red, green, and black feathers"} and a carved stone mask. His face features dark painted lines across his cheeks and nose. He is outfitted in heavy, intricate ceremonial armor, including a large stone necklace with a face pendant, armbands, and a detailed belt with a loincloth featuring carved glyphs and faces. In his right hand, he grips a {argument name="weapon" default="tall wooden spear with a stone tip and red tassels"}, and in his left hand, he holds a round shield displaying a large carved face with red fringed edges. The background features a towering {argument name="background structure" default="ancient stepped stone pyramid"} with steep stairs, banners hanging near the top entrance, and small figures standing on the steps. Lush green jungle foliage surrounds the temple under a partly cloudy sky, with a tall carved stone stela standing in the right foreground, all captured with {argument name="lighting style" default="epic cinematic lighting"}.

title: Custom Building Block Set Photography
author: pozitiv4ik
prompt: A photorealistic amateur photograph of a custom building block set resting on a light wood grain table in a living room. In the background stands a large product box with a red logo reading "{argument name="brand name" default="BRICKLY"} BUILDING SETS". The box features text reading "8+", "540 PCS", "5 FIGURES", and the main large title "{argument name="set title" default="WATTERSON FAMILY HOUSE"}". A red circular badge on the box reads "CUSTOM SET FAN DESIGN", and the box art depicts the house and characters under a blue sky. In the foreground sits the fully assembled block model of a {argument name="house color" default="blue"} two-story suburban house with a brown roof, white porch, red steps, a white picket fence, and a blocky green tree. To the left of the house is a built block model of a {argument name="car color" default="pink"} station wagon. Standing in a row in front of the house are exactly 5 custom block minifigures: a blue cat in tan pants, an orange fish with legs, a tall pink rabbit in a white shirt and tie, a blue cat in a white shirt, and a small pink rabbit in an orange dress. The background is a slightly blurred living room with a grey sofa and white blinds.

title: Photoreal School Uniform Shrine Portrait
author: AIおじさん
prompt: A photorealistic waist-up portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} standing outdoors in bright natural sunlight, framed in a vertical composition. She has long, straight {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair with a glossy shine, parted slightly off center, falling over both shoulders. She wears a crisp white short-sleeve school uniform shirt with a structured collar, a navy blue striped necktie, and a detailed embroidered crest patch on the left chest pocket featuring a crown and heraldic emblem. Pose her at a slight three-quarter angle with relaxed posture, her head turned subtly to the side for a refined candid fashion-photo feel. Place her in front of vivid {argument name="background setting" default="red shrine architecture"} with rich red pillars and a curved blue roof detail visible in the blurred background, using shallow depth of field and creamy bokeh to keep the subject sharply in focus. The lighting should be clean, high-contrast, and flattering, with bright highlights on the hair and shirt, realistic fabric folds, natural skin tones, and a polished premium portrait aesthetic reminiscent of Japanese commercial photography.

title: Seated Brown Monochrome Studio Portrait
author: 浅野 美咲（Asano Misaki）
prompt: A realistic studio portrait of a young East Asian woman seated on a simple black folding chair, framed from upper thighs to head in a vertical composition. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair parted near the center and tied back into a low ponytail, with a few soft strands near the ears, small delicate earrings, fair smooth skin, and a calm neutral pose with her hands resting together between her knees. She wears a fitted ribbed zip-front crop top in {argument name="top color" default="deep chocolate brown"} with a pointed collar, three-quarter sleeves, and the zipper partly open to create a deep neckline, paired with high-waisted straight-leg pants in a matching {argument name="pants color" default="warm brown"}. The styling is monochrome brown-on-brown, with subtle fabric texture and natural body contours. The background is a soft off-white draped fabric backdrop with gentle folds, lit by diffused natural-looking window light for a clean, soft, editorial indoor look. Photorealistic, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, understated fashion portrait, minimal set, centered subject, relaxed seated posture, high detail skin and fabric texture.

title: 水彩双重曝光奇幻剪影
author: AI Network Technology
prompt: A dreamy watercolor double-exposure illustration where the main shape is the side profile silhouette of a {argument name="main subject silhouette" default="young anime girl facing left"}. Inside her silhouette is a rich, layered fantasy world. At the top is a {argument name="top scenery" default="grand white castle with multiple spires under a starry night sky with a crescent moon"}. Below the castle, two cloaked figures stand in a mystical forest. In the center, a {argument name="central character" default="young female mage with pink hair holding a glowing magical staff"} stands prominently. To the left of the mage, a white horse is visible. At the bottom of the silhouette is a {argument name="bottom scenery" default="fantasy village surrounded by blooming cherry blossom trees, with a large open spellbook and a sword resting in the foreground"}. The artwork features a {argument name="color palette" default="soft pastel purples, pinks, and blues"} color palette. The background outside the silhouette is textured parchment with soft watercolor splatters and fading cherry blossom petals, with the signature "tamanyo" written in cursive at the bottom left.

title: Summer Beach Beverage Commercial Shot
author: ハイボールながたにえん｜CHO（最高ハイボール責任者）｜カルチャープレナー
prompt: A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 lemon slice and a sprig of rosemary, sitting next to 1 silver aluminum can covered in cold condensation. The can prominently displays the English text {argument name="product name" default="TOKYO HIGHBALL"} below a small gold star logo, featuring a graphic of the drink itself and the Japanese text "アルコール分 7%" near the bottom. To the right of the can, 2 cut lemon wedges rest on the table. In the softly blurred background, a sunny beach scene unfolds with sparkling turquoise water and a clear blue sky. Standing to the left in the background is 1 young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a light blue skirt, looking out toward the ocean. Floating elegantly in the sky above the scene is the Japanese text {argument name="catchphrase" default="夏、これがいい。"}. The overall lighting is radiant and inviting, with sparkling bokeh and lens flares emphasizing the crisp, cold, and refreshing atmosphere of a perfect summer day.

title: 日本新闻广播模拟
author: IT navi
prompt: A photorealistic television news broadcast scene featuring a {argument name="anchor appearance" default="young Japanese female with shoulder-length dark hair wearing a light beige blouse"} and a small black lapel microphone, sitting at a news desk and speaking directly to the camera. The studio background is modern with blue and white lighting and a blurred nighttime city skyline on the right. In the top left corner, there is a dark blue graphic with the white text "{argument name="channel logo text" default="NEWS TODAY"}". To the anchor's left is a large presentation monitor displaying a news graphic with a white background and light blue network nodes. The monitor features a dark blue "最新情報" tag, the text "{argument name="subheadline" default="OpenAIの新しい画像生成モデル"}", a large prominent headline "{argument name="main headline" default="「GPT-image-2」"}", the text "がリリース", an OpenAI logo, and a dark blue bottom banner reading "より高精細に より正確に 画像生成の可能性がさらに広がる". Across the bottom of the entire screen is a news ticker lower third with a dark blue "速報" box and the scrolling text "{argument name="ticker text" default="OpenAI 画期的な新画像生成モデル「GPT-image-2」をリリース"}".

title: 护肤美妆广告人像
author: 𝟡𝟜 𝚅̷𝙰̷𝙽̷ ᴾᴸᴬʸᶠᴼᴿᴳᴱ
prompt: A high-end beauty commercial photograph featuring a close-up of a young East Asian woman with flawless, dewy glass skin. She rests her face gently against her hands and bare arms on a pristine white surface, looking directly at the camera with a soft, serene expression. Her dark hair is loosely pulled back with delicate strands framing her face. In the foreground sits a frosted glass serum bottle with a silver pump, displaying the text "{argument name="brand name" default="LUVIN"}" and "{argument name="product name" default="CALMING MOISTURE SERUM"}". The background is a soft, bright off-white studio setting. Elegant Korean typography is arranged on the left side, featuring the large main headline "{argument name="main headline" default="오늘, 피부는 스스로 빛난다"}". Smaller supporting text above reads "자연에서 찾은 피부의 균형", and text below reads "루빈 카밍 모이스처 세럼" and "민감해진 피부에 전하는 부드럽고 깊은 보습". The brand name "{argument name="brand name" default="LUVIN"}" appears again in the bottom left corner. A tiny drop of clear serum rests on the surface near the bottom left. The lighting is soft, diffused, and luminous, emphasizing a clean, minimalist skincare aesthetic.

title: 复古机密案件档案
author: PSS
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张俯视视角的电影级静物照，展示了深色木桌上一份复古的机密调查档案，画面居中并占据大部分空间。展示一叠 3 个磨损的马尼拉文件夹，带有陈旧的米色纸张、磨损的边缘、细微的污渍和逼真的纸张纹理。最上方的文件夹是视觉焦点，左上角用 1 个超大号银色回形针固定。顶部中央用粗体黑色等宽字体打字显示标题 CONFIDENTIAL – CASE FILES，下方有一条细水平线。添加 2 个红色橡胶印章标记：一个在右上角附近，略微倾斜地印着 "CONFIDENTIAL"；另一个在右下角的方框印章，印着 "HANDLING INSTRUCTIONS DO NOT COPY – DO NOT DISTRIBUTE"。在文件夹堆叠的右侧边缘，显示 1 个带标签的侧边栏，上面写着 "CASE FILE NO."，下方有一条粗黑色的涂改遮盖条。页面格式仿照旧式打字机打印的政府文件，带有清晰的黑色墨迹、略显不齐的打字机对齐方式，以及许多遮盖关键细节的粗黑色涂改条。准确包含 5 个编号部分："1. SUBJECT INFORMATION"、"2. CASE SUMMARY"、"3. DETAILS"、"4. ASSOCIATES / CONTACTS" 和 "5. REMARKS"。在页眉区域，包含以下字段："CASE FILE NO.:"（带黑色涂改条）、"DATE OPENED:"（后接 March 14, 20___）、"PREPARED BY:"（带黑色涂改条）、"DEPARTMENT:"（后接 Internal Investigations Unit）以及 "CLASSIFICATION:"（后接 CONFIDENTIAL）。在第 1 部分中，包含 6 个字段："NAME:"、"ALIASES:"、"DATE OF BIRTH:"、"PLACE OF BIRTH:"、"LAST KNOWN ADDRESS:" 和 "OCCUPATION:"，每个字段后均跟随长度不一的黑色涂改条。在第 2 部分中，添加一段简短的打字机风格案件摘要文本，并在句子流中嵌入 5 个独立的黑色涂改条。在第 3 部分中，添加第二段详细文本，并在段落中嵌入 4 个独立的黑色涂改条。在第 4 部分中，包含一个 3 列的表格，标签分别为 "NAME"、"RELATIONSHIP" 和 "NOTES"，共 3 行填充内容，每个单元格的内容均被黑色涂改条覆盖。在第 5 部分中，添加一句关于敏感信息和未经授权披露的简短警告。使用温暖的深褐色光线，文件夹边缘周围有柔和的阴影，带有细微的晕影，营造出一种忧郁的黑色电影档案氛围。图像应具有逼真、触感真实、神秘且略带灰尘的感觉，就像为犯罪惊悚片或世界观构建道具拍摄的机密侦探档案。

title: Luxury Cosmetic Web Advertisement
author: ぱんちゃん🍞
prompt: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÉRE"} and {argument name="product type" default="MOISTURE RICH CREAM"} with "AGING CARE*" below it. The background consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The lighting is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese typography reads {argument name="main headline" default="肌に、静かな贅沢を。"} above a small decorative gold divider and the text {argument name="subheadline" default="高保湿×エイジングケア*"}. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains Japanese text meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action button with a thin gold border containing the text {argument name="button text" default="詳しく見る"} and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains Japanese text meaning '*Care according to age'.

title: 照片级逼真蓝光光盘封面肖像
author: 林檎/魔女萌え
prompt: A highly realistic Blu-ray disc cover featuring a portrait of a young Japanese woman. She has short, messy black bob hair and wears large, round, thin wire-rimmed glasses. She is dressed in a thick, textured, dark red knit sweater. Her expression is soft and alluring, looking directly at the viewer. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned indoor setting, possibly a cafe, with a glimpse of a white coffee cup and saucer on a table to the right. The lighting is warm and cinematic, highlighting her face and the texture of the sweater. The image is framed within a standard blue Blu-ray case border, complete with the Blu-ray Disc logo at the top center, top right, and bottom left corners. On the left side, there is large, elegant vertical Japanese text that reads '{argument name="main title" default="魔女乃家 林檎"}' with smaller furigana text beside it reading 'まじょのいえ りんご', accompanied by delicate, glowing pink decorative lines and star/pentagram motifs. In the bottom right corner, there is smaller Japanese text reading '{argument name="subtitle" default="魔女のように、あなたを魅了する。"}' above the English text 'R I N G O' and 'M A J Y O N O I E'.

title: 写实的中国古代街景
author: 搞设计的花生仁
prompt: A highly detailed, {argument name="art style" default="hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render"} of an {argument name="historical setting" default="ancient Chinese street scene inspired by Along the River During the Qingming Festival"}. The elevated, wide-angle perspective looks down upon a bustling dirt crossroad surrounded by traditional wooden buildings with intricate grey tiled roofs. On the left, a building features a sign reading "安居客栈" with red lanterns hanging outside. The scene is densely populated with dozens of villagers, merchants, and travelers in traditional period clothing. People are engaged in various activities: carrying woven baskets on shoulder poles, tending to market stalls under large wooden parasols, riding horses, and pulling a wooden cart with large spoked wheels in the lower right. A large, leafy green tree stands centrally among the shops, and weeping willow branches frame the extreme left foreground. The atmosphere is lively and dusty, illuminated by {argument name="lighting" default="warm afternoon sunlight"} that casts sharp, intricate shadows across the highly textured, hyper-detailed environment.

title: 6 格企业 Logo 设计概念表
author: 河村風真

title: 新中式水墨山水海报，竖版9:16构图，东方极简美学风格，
author: liyue_ai
prompt:
新中式水墨山水海报，竖版9:16构图，东方极简美学风格，
大面积留白，整体色调为春日清晨氛围（青绿色、雾蓝、淡灰、浅墨），低饱和、清透柔和，高级质感。
画面主体为奇峻巍峨的群山，从中间平静湖面的两侧拔地而起，占据左右两侧画面，
山体以水墨晕染表现，浓淡干湿变化丰富，局部融入淡青绿色渲染，体现春意生机。
山峰被湿润轻柔的晨雾包裹，雾气层层递进，与浅青蓝天空自然融合，形成空气透视与空间纵深。

湖面如镜面般平静，呈现微青绿色调，倒映山体与天空，反射略带柔焦与雾化扩散效果，增强春日湿润与梦幻氛围。
中景一艘带弧形篷顶的小木舟缓慢漂浮，船桨轻触水面形成细腻涟漪，水纹自然扩散，整体保持极静状态。

船上为一位红衣渔女，体量较小（远景比例），人物简化处理为水墨剪影 + 轻微设色，
身着低饱和朱砂红传统服饰（非鲜艳红），颜色略被雾气柔化，
人物面部不刻画细节，仅保留轮廓与姿态（如轻扶船篷或执桨），
红色在水面形成淡淡倒影，作为画面唯一暖色视觉焦点。

岸边点缀疏林与春季新生植被，采用淡墨 + 淡青绿点染，虚实结合，增强节奏与生命气息。

少量飞鸟在远空掠过，轻盈疏散分布，增强空间层次与灵动感。

画面顶部居中竖排书法：“东方美学”，采用传统手写行书或行草风格（王羲之笔意），
笔触自然起伏、提按分明，带飞白与墨韵扩散效果，避免字体感。
书法颜色为深墨青或柔和墨黑，与整体画面统一。
整体风格：水墨 + 现代极简设计融合，春日禅意、空灵湿润、宁静氛围，
冷暖对比克制，电影感光影，高级艺术海报质感，8K超清细节。

title: 电影感香蕉红酒广告
author: バナナ🍌
prompt: A high-end cinematic commercial photography shot of a muscular humanoid banana character standing in a dimly lit, moody wine cellar. The character has a realistic yellow banana peel body, a cartoonish face with thick black eyebrows and a wide toothy smile, and muscular human arms. He is wearing a red apron and elegantly holding a glass of red wine. To his right rests a dark glass bottle of red wine on a wooden surface, featuring a classic, elegant label that reads {argument name="wine brand" default="Maison Rouge B."} with an illustration of a chateau. The background features blurred shelves filled with wine bottles, illuminated by sophisticated, dramatic lighting with deep red and brown tones. In the top left corner, elegant white Japanese typography displays the main tagline {argument name="main tagline" default="その一杯に、理由はある。"} followed by a smaller subtitle {argument name="sub tagline" default="甘さではなく、余韻で選ぶ。"}. In the bottom left corner, tiny legal text reads "※お酒は20歳になってから". The bottom right corner features the brand name {argument name="wine brand" default="Maison Rouge B."} in a clean serif font.

title: 真实犯罪调查缩略图
author: Mirochill
prompt: A YouTube thumbnail-style collage for a {argument name="overall mood" default="dark, dramatic, true crime investigation"}. In the center is a highly detailed, close-up portrait of an {argument name="central figure" default="older man with grey hair and deep wrinkles resembling Jeffrey Epstein"}, wearing a black polo shirt, with a faint red glowing outline separating him from the background. On the left side, a {argument name="left background scene" default="tropical island with luxury villas and a flying airplane in a dark sky"}. Below the island, a conspiracy board motif features exactly 2 red push pins connected by 3 thick red strings. On the top right side, a hazy, sepia-toned depiction of the {argument name="right background scene" default="US Capitol building with the silhouettes of 3 men in suits facing it"}. On the bottom right, an open manila folder containing a {argument name="document type" default="heavily redacted dossier with thick black marker lines and a smaller photograph of the central man"}. The overall composition is cinematic, intense, and heavily stylized for a documentary video.

title: 高端未来感 AI 工作空间
author: NexAIverse | IA útil diaria
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张电影质感的未来主义控制室工作空间，采用深色高端科技美学。视角位于一名坐在时尚办公桌前的单人身后，画面中心前景处，正对着一整面悬浮的透明全息界面墙。场景由近乎全黑背景上的电光蓝和青色光线照亮，构图中心略高于桌面处有一个光芒四射的 AI 核心或神经球体，向四周辐射出数十条分支状的发光数据流，如同数字神经系统般连接着每一块屏幕。画面中的人物为身着深色服装的专业人士剪影，坐在现代办公椅上，对称的构图强调了规模感与沉浸感。桌面上摆放着 3 台显示代码和技术仪表盘的主显示器、左侧 1 台打开的笔记本电脑、右侧 1 盏纤细的任务灯、1 个咖啡杯以及少量极简办公配件。人物周围环绕着 10 个大型悬浮 UI 窗口：1 个左侧垂直个人资料/导航面板，包含圆形头像、名称 ALEXANDER 以及菜单项；1 个左上方项目信息卡片，标题为 PROJECT CHRONOS；1 个顶部中央代码编辑器窗口，标题为 "CODE SYNTHESIS"，显示密集的编程文本；1 个中右上方助手面板，标题为 "AI ASSISTANT"，带有发光波形和简短聊天文本；1 个右上方数据窗口，标题为 "DATA STREAM"；1 个中左侧媒体生成面板，标题为 "GENERATING VISUAL ASSET"，显示带有高耸岩石尖塔的戏剧性科幻景观，下方有多个缩略图预览；1 个小型中央进度卡片，标题为 "EXECUTING WORKFLOW"，带有进度条；1 个中右侧世界地图分析面板，标题为 "GLOBAL NETWORK"，带有发光连接点；1 个左下方工程渲染面板，标题为 "3D MODEL RENDER"，显示未来机械引擎或航天器组件；1 个右下方仪表盘，标题为 "SYSTEM MONITOR"，带有圆形百分比图表和图形。此外包含 2 个较小的侧面板：1 个左下方语音面板，标题为 "VOICE INTERFACE"，带有波形可视化效果；1 个右侧窄面板，标题为 "ACTIVITY LOG"，带有状态条目。在主窗口之间散布着几个微小的悬浮微卡片和图像缩略图，由光迹连接，暗示着多任务 AI 编排。界面设计应呈现出极致精美、玻璃拟态、透明、边缘发光且高端的质感，配有细霓虹边框、微妙的网格线、小图标以及高端科幻 UI 字体。采用戏剧性的广角构图、深邃的景深、清晰的细节、体积光效果、反射表面，以及以发光 AI 核心为中心的平衡对称布局。整体氛围充满远见、奢华且智能，如同将 the future of creative AI interfaces 变为现实，将软件工程、生成式设计、全球连接和自主工作流管理融为一体，打造出沉浸式场景。

title: 复古动漫风柔和色调睡眠场景
author: minesan
prompt: An illustration in a {argument name="art style" default="90s retro anime aesthetic"} featuring a cute girl sleeping peacefully in bed. She has voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="pastel rainbow"} hair and is wearing large retro sunglasses with yellow frames and purple gradient lenses resting on her forehead. She wears colorful patterned pajamas and heart-shaped earrings, clutching a pink blanket decorated with pastel rainbows, hearts, and stars. The bedroom is bathed in a {argument name="color palette" default="vibrant neon pastel"} color palette with soft glowing lighting and sparkles. In the top right corner, a glowing cloud-shaped sign reads "{argument name="neon sign text" default="Sweet Dreams"}". A window on the left shows a dark blue night sky with a crescent moon and stars over a city silhouette. Hanging star ornaments dangle from the ceiling. On the bed next to her is 1 small yellow plushie with a pink bow. On a nightstand in the bottom right corner, there is 1 star-patterned lamp, 1 mug with a heart design, and 1 book titled "{argument name="book title" default="Good night"}".

title: 僵尸生存 RPG 动漫风格广告海报
author: 蓮華＠AIおもしろ研究者
prompt:
创作一张戏剧性的日式僵尸生存 RPG 手机游戏广告海报，采用动漫与电影相结合的风格。垂直智能手机海报布局，高密度宣传设计，背景为黄昏时分残酷的城市末日，包含废弃的街道、烟雾、火花、碎片、受损的建筑物、霓虹灯，以及从后方逼近的僵尸群。画面中央，一位年轻的动漫女性坐在地上，姿势略显慵懒，双腿弯曲，一只手垂直握着一把黑色手枪。她留着齐肩的深棕色至黑色直发，皮肤苍白，穿着一件沾满血迹的超大号脏白色 T 恤。T 恤上垂直印有醒目的日文书法：“働きたくね〜”。她的表情区域处理得简洁且不突兀，以确保构图重点突出 T 恤、武器和氛围。在她周围，多名身穿破烂衣服的僵尸从左右背景中伸出双手向前抓取。

采用具有冲击力的游戏主视觉设计，包含 8 个清晰划分的宣传区域。区域 1：左上角游戏 Logo 区，包含 3 个文本元素，带有巨大的做旧英文标题“Dead or work”、较小的日文副标题“ゾンビサバイバルRPG”，以及带有白色和红色文字的厚重黑色喷溅背景。区域 2：右侧垂直标语区，包含 2 个文本元素，在粗糙的黑色笔触条上，上方为白色日文“動かない、ただ”，下方为巨大的红色垂直文字“生き残れ。”。区域 3：左中功能列表面板，包含 4 行功能，每行都有一个黑色方块内的白色图标和黄色/白色日文文案；标签分别为“ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ”、“拠点を強化・カスタマイズ”、“仲間と協力プレイ”和“デイリーミッションで報酬GET”。区域 4：右中奖励活动面板，包含 1 个标题和 3 个奖励项目；标题位于明亮的锯齿状黄色爆炸框中，写着“今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!”，下方是三个标注为“ゴールド ×5000”、“レア武器 (7日間)”和“サバイバルキット ×10”的物品框。区域 5：中下部游戏截图条，包含 4 个带有说明文字的缩略图；说明文字分别为“リアルタイムバトル!”、“基地を自由にカスタム!”、“仲間とレイドボスに挑め!”和“広大なオープンワールド!”。区域 6：底部行动呼吁横幅，包含 2 个文本元素，带有巨大的黄色和红色日文短语“今すぐダウンロード!”以及较小的白色/红色副标题“あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。”。区域 7：右下角商店徽章，包含 2 个徽章，显示 App Store 和 Google Play 风格的下载按钮。区域 8：右下角 QR 码区域，包含 1 个白色方块内的 QR 码。

整体美学：超精细、高对比度、肮脏、强烈、商业化精良的抽卡/手机游戏广告，将动漫角色艺术与写实的僵尸恐怖背景相结合。使用醒目的做旧字体、黑色笔触纹理、红色警示色、黄色宣传高光、金属 UI 边框以及电影般的橙灰色光影。

title: Fantasy Woman Hugging a White Ram
author: Adan Avelar Islas
prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic vertical portrait of a medieval or fantasy woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long copper-red hair"}, shown from the chest up, gently embracing a large white ram. The woman wears a dark moss-green wool dress or tunic with ornate embroidered cuffs and a heavy fur-trimmed cloak or shawl over her shoulders, evoking a Viking or highland aesthetic. Her hair is thick, wavy, and slightly windblown, with small braids woven into the crown. The ram has dense curly cream-white fleece, a calm expression with eyes closed, and prominent spiral horns curling outward and forward. The woman’s hand rests tenderly at the ram’s neck, conveying warmth, protection, and companionship. Set outdoors in a rugged, overcast landscape with softly blurred hills or moorland in the background, cool gray sky, shallow depth of field, natural diffused lighting, rich texture detail in hair, wool, fur, and fabric, earthy muted color palette, intimate framing, realistic skin and animal features. Add black text in the top-left corner reading {argument name="corner text" default="GPT Image 2"}.

title: 第一人称 VRChat 模因联动截图
author: Senb0n22a
prompt: A first-person POV screenshot inside a {argument name="game environment" default="VRChat lobby"} featuring a dark checkered floor, a "VR CHAT" welcome sign on the left, a "Mirror" doorway, and an "Avatar Showcase" on the right. The viewer's hands are visible in the foreground, wearing white sleeves with red dashed stitching, reaching forward. A red muted microphone UI icon sits in the bottom left corner. In the center stands {argument name="tall character" default="Ran Mouri from Detective Conan in her blue school uniform"}, smiling with closed eyes and {argument name="action" default="patting the heads of the two smaller characters"}. On her left is {argument name="small character 1" default="Conan Edogawa in his blue suit and red bowtie"}. On her right is {argument name="small character 2" default="the Ugandan Knuckles meme character"}. Each character has a floating nameplate above them: the tall girl's reads "Ran Mouri" in yellow over "LetsAskAQuestion" in white, the boy's reads "Conan Edogawa" over "conan.exe", and the red creature's reads "Ugandan Knuckles" over "do u know de way".

title: 中国传统书法与水墨画
author: siyue
prompt: A photograph of a piece of aged, slightly textured paper featuring traditional Chinese calligraphy and an ink wash painting. The upper and left portions of the paper are filled with handwritten Chinese text in elegant running script, with the centered title "{argument name="title text" default="赤壁赋"}" and the author "{argument name="author name" default="苏轼"}" written next to it. The text flows across multiple lines, resembling a classical poem. Integrated into the bottom right section of the paper is a traditional Chinese ink wash painting depicting {argument name="painting subject" default="a serene nighttime river scene with craggy, misty mountains"}. A single pale full moon hangs in the sky, casting a shimmering reflection on the rippling water below. In the foreground, there is {argument name="boat details" default="a small wooden boat with a woven canopy carrying 2 figures in traditional robes"}. A single square red seal stamp is stamped in the extreme bottom right corner. The image has a warm, historical aesthetic, capturing the authentic look of ink on traditional rice paper.

title: 水墨机甲山水
author: 𝙋𝙖𝙨𝙨𝙡𝙪𝙤
prompt: A traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting featuring a giant mecha integrated into the misty mountains. The mecha, resembling {argument name="mecha type" default="Evangelion Unit-01"}, features a purple and green color scheme with a prominent horn and the number "01" on its shoulder. Its massive form dissolves into expressive, dripping black ink washes, seamlessly blending into the rocky mountain formations. The surrounding landscape includes steep, jagged peaks painted with teal and green washes, cascading waterfalls, ancient pine trees, and small traditional pavilions perched on the cliffs. A flock of birds flies through the dense fog filling the valleys. In the top left corner, vertical traditional Chinese calligraphy reads {argument name="main text" default="初號機"} followed by {argument name="sub text" default="人之造物 亦為山水"}, accompanied by a red artist seal stamp. Another red seal is stamped in the bottom right corner. The entire artwork is rendered on textured, aged rice paper, utilizing dynamic brushstrokes and atmospheric perspective typical of classical Shan shui art.

title: 科技公司 CEO 会议
author: Binkg
prompt: A candid, realistic smartphone photo of five men having an intense discussion around a dark wooden conference table in a modern, minimalist office. On the mid-left, a man resembling {argument name="mid-left person" default="Sam Altman"} in a green sweater gestures with his hands while speaking. In the center, a man resembling {argument name="center person" default="Mark Zuckerberg"} in a grey t-shirt listens intently. On the mid-right, a man resembling {argument name="mid-right person" default="Elon Musk"} in a black jacket gestures while responding. Two other men wearing glasses and dark sweaters sit at the far ends of the table, observing with their hands near their faces. The table is cluttered with 3 white ceramic mugs, 3 clear drinking glasses, 1 silver soda can, open laptops, tablets, scattered papers, notebooks, and tangled black cables. The room features plain white walls and a large black-framed window revealing trees outside. The lighting is indoor and slightly grainy, giving it an authentic, {argument name="photo style" default="leaked behind-the-scenes"} aesthetic.

title: 动漫风格：镜中映出的年幼自我
author: Senb0n22a
prompt: A cinematic anime illustration of a mature woman looking into a dark mirror, but her reflection shows her as a young child. The foreground features the tall, mature woman seen from behind in a three-quarter view, with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair, pale skin, and wearing a dark dress adorned with black feather-like accents on the shoulders. She is reaching out to touch the mirror with her right hand. The mirror reflects a young child version of herself with {argument name="eye color" default="golden"} eyes, slightly pointed ears, and a simple white dress with red ribbon bows. The child's hand is pressed against the glass, perfectly aligning with the older woman's hand. The scene has dark, moody, cinematic lighting with a muted, almost sepia-toned color palette, creating high contrast between the pale skin and the dark background. Vertical Japanese text is placed on the left reading {argument name="left text" default="吸血鬼の始祖 怪異の王 キスショット・アセロラオリオン・ハートアンダーブレード"} and on the right reading {argument name="right text" default="私は・私の中にいる もう一人の私"}.

title: Herbal Chicken Soup Label Transformation
author: 渣猫看世界🦭/acc
prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base style and preserving the central chicken illustration, transform the image into a product packaging label for a herbal soup mix. Shift the chicken to the right side. Replace the top text with a large, bold black brush-stroke headline {argument name="main headline" default="元气祛湿 鸡煲汤包"} and a smaller subtitle {argument name="subtitle" default="吃山林土货 味道当然好!"}. On the left side, add a new woven basket containing exactly 6 distinct piles of ingredients: woody root sticks, white square cubes, round sliced brown roots, yellow soybeans, dried orange peel strips, and dark red dates. Attach 6 small brown rectangular labels with white text to these ingredients. Below the chicken, add a circular orange badge containing the text {argument name="ingredients list" default="内含有:五指毛桃、茯苓、土茯苓、黄豆、陈皮、红枣"}. At the bottom, create a solid orange rectangular banner featuring a cooking pot icon, the text {argument name="usage instructions" default="用法:把汤料清洗干净放入锅中，加入姜片煮20分钟，后加入鸡肉再煮20分钟即可。"}, and a secondary slogan {argument name="bottom slogan" default="天然好料 滋补好汤"}.

title: Geometric Bird Riding Bicycle
author: Mojofull
prompt: A minimalist flat vector illustration on a light gray background showing a whimsical bird riding a bicycle, built entirely from simple geometric shapes with thick black outlines. The bicycle is a black line-drawn road bike in side view facing left, with 2 large wheels, each wheel divided by a vertical and horizontal spoke cross, a simple triangular frame, a small black saddle, pedals, and a thin black ground line running horizontally beneath the bike. The rider is a stylized white bird with a large round body, a smaller round head, a pointed orange beak opened wide, and a pink lower beak interior. The bird has 1 visible black eye, a simple curved black line on top of the head, 1 teardrop-shaped wing behind the neck, and 1 angled white tail feather shape pointing backward. The bird leans forward over the bicycle as if actively riding. It has 2 long narrow orange legs with black outlines extending downward over the frame toward the pedals. Keep the composition centered, playful, clean, and abstract, with no shading, no texture, and a modern icon-like graphic style.

title: 浪漫体素晚餐约会
author: Mirochill
prompt: A first-person POV shot of a romantic dinner date with a {argument name="character" default="Minecraft Creeper"}. The scene is set in a {argument name="setting" default="romantic dimly lit restaurant"} with warm ambient lighting and a blurred background showing other tables and a window looking out into the night. The character is sitting directly across the table. Around its head are 7 {argument name="atmosphere effect" default="floating 8-bit red hearts"}. On the wooden table between the viewer and the character, there is a red and white checkered placemat. On it sits a voxel-style plate containing a {argument name="food" default="blocky steak with red and green garnish"}. To the left is a blocky, transparent wine glass filled with red wine. To the right is a blocky red rose in a transparent blocky vase. There are 2 glowing blocky candles in wooden holders on the table. The foreground shows the blurred edge of the viewer's own matching plate of food. The entire image blends realistic cinematic lighting and depth of field with voxel-based, 3D pixel-art objects.

title: 动漫轻小说封面与排版
author: 💐animaru_san
prompt: An anime light novel cover. Top left features a stylized Japanese title {argument name="main title" default="黒焔の魔眼使いは、追放先の学園都市で三人の最強ヒロインに溺愛される"} and English subtitle {argument name="english subtitle" default="The Exiled Black-Flame Eye in Arcane Metropolis"}. A vertical Japanese blurb on the right reads {argument name="vertical blurb" default="追放されたはずの俺が、なぜか最強美少女たちの運命そのものになっていた。"}. The scene includes 4 characters and 1 creature. Centered is a male protagonist with {argument name="protagonist hair color" default="black"} hair, a glowing red eye, and a dark coat. He is surrounded by 3 heroines: a top-right girl with long {argument name="heroine hair color" default="silver"} hair and a white-blue crystal dress; a mid-left blonde girl with a side ponytail casting a pink magic circle; and a bottom-right girl with short magenta hair holding a grimoire. A black-and-white wolf familiar sits bottom-left. The background is a dark gothic academy at night, filled with floating pink petals, glowing magic particles, shattered glass, and a faint demonic figure top-right.

title: 雨夜巷弄中的表情包人物
author: なこ/ChatGPT沼
prompt: A full-body portrait of a person standing in a {argument name="setting" default="narrow wet cobblestone alleyway at night"}. The person is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="dark jacket and dark trousers"}, with one hand resting against the rough, textured wall on the left and the other hand casually tucked into their pocket. Their face is completely obscured by a {argument name="face replacement" default="large yellow smiling emoji with blushing cheeks"}. The scene is illuminated by a single vintage street lamp mounted on the right wall, casting warm yellow light that reflects beautifully off the wet paving stones, creating deep, moody shadows. In the background, a small illuminated sign reads "{argument name="background sign text" default="三条小路"}". The artwork is a {argument name="art style" default="modern digital illustration with high contrast lighting and subtle shin-hanga influences"}, featuring a red square seal in the bottom right corner with the text "新版画" and a blank white vertical signature box with a tiny red seal in the bottom left.

title: 混乱公路旅行喜剧海报
author: nazca alwave
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张明亮、混乱的院线喜剧电影海报，采用精致的好莱坞单张海报风格，垂直构图。一辆复古黄色 Mini Cooper 正沿着阳光明媚、棕榈树成荫的城市街道向观众疾驰而来。车内挤满了 5 位度假的朋友：前排可见 2 人，后排挤着 2 人，另有 1 名男子趴在车顶行李架上，咧着嘴大笑，戏剧性地指向前方。每个人都穿着色彩鲜艳的休闲度假服装，包括热带印花、宽松衬衫和遮阳帽。场景显得喧闹、鲁莽且充满乐趣。车顶堆放着行李箱和旅行包。右后方有一辆闪烁着警灯的警车正在追赶。左侧有一个歪斜的木制路标，上面有 3 个牌子，分别写着“BEACH”（海滩）、“MOUNTAINS”（山脉）和“WHAT COULD GO WRONG?”（还能出什么差错？）。一只尖叫的海鸥停在路标顶端。右侧有一个巨大的路边甜甜圈店招牌，上面写着“DONUT”，一张折叠的纸质地图在空中飞舞。街道上充满了动态模糊、灰尘、碎片和轮胎留下的能量感，上方是饱和的蓝天和蓬松的云朵。在最顶部，放置 4 位演员的姓名，使用黑色压缩大写字母：“DAVE JOHNSON”、“LILY WANG”、“KEVIN HARTLEY”和“AMY CHEN”。下方添加一行堆叠的标语，使用粗体大写字母：深海军蓝色的“THEY CAME. THEY SAW.”，以及红色的“THEY MESSED EVERYTHING UP.”。主标题以巨大的趣味 3D 字体占据中上方：“VACATION MODE”，其中“VACATION”为亮黄色，“MODE”为白色，带有厚重的蓝色阴影，字母 O 被一个戴着太阳镜的简单笑脸取代。在标题周围添加黄色的小涂鸦式强调符号。在标题右下方，放置一个倾斜的亮粉色横幅，上面写着“A COMEDY ABOUT BAD IDEAS & GOOD TIMES”（一部关于坏主意与好时光的喜剧），并配有一个指向下方的手绘弯曲箭头。汽车牌照上写着“NO PLAN ALL FUN”。在底部附近，添加一句黄色的发光引语：“LAUGH-OUT-LOUD FUNNY!”，下方写着“- MOVIE BUZZ”。在底部中心，添加上映信息“ONLY IN THEATERS”，然后是“JUNE 20”，使用醒目的黄色粗体大写字母。在最底边缘添加微小的法律声明，并在角落添加小型制作公司 Logo，包括左下角的“GOOD TIME FILMS”和右下角的“NO PLAN ALL FUN”。采用高对比度照明、夸张的透视效果、光泽感的商业海报质感、鲜艳的夏季色彩以及搞怪的公路旅行喜剧基调。

title: 3 格胶带梗漫画
author: noel.index

title: 复古科技 CEO 与超级英雄猫咪
author: appcaster
prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic portrait of {argument name="main subject" default="Sam Altman"} on a gritty rooftop at dusk, wearing a black bomber jacket with an {argument name="company logo" default="OpenAI"} logo. He is flanked by exactly 4 cats in superhero costumes: a tabby Spider-Man, a black Batman, an orange Iron Man with a glowing reactor, and a tabby Captain America with a shield. The background shows a {argument name="city skyline" default="1996 New York City skyline featuring the Twin Towers"}. A whiteboard reads "MISSION: {argument name="whiteboard mission" default="MAKE INTELLIGENCE BENEFIT ALL."}" and lists exactly 4 checked items: "BETTER MODELS", "SAFE DEPLOYMENT", "REAL-WORLD IMPACT", and "SAVE SOME TREATS". A foreground wooden desk holds a retro 1990s laptop with the company logo, a mug reading "BUILD THE FUTURE TOGETHER", a walkie-talkie, and a WIRED magazine titled "{argument name="magazine headline" default="THE AGE OF INTELLIGENCE IS HERE"}". Painted wall signs read "NEW YORK NO SLEEP. BIG DREAMS." and "THE FUTURE WILL BE BUILT 1996".

title: 带有广告设计网格的 AI 聊天截图
author: フカタイッセイ 🌶 🌶 🌶
prompt: 一张深色模式的移动端聊天界面截图，展示了两次独立的日语提示词与 AI 生成广告设计的交互结果。背景接近黑色。右侧对齐了 2 个大的圆角浅灰色聊天气泡，每个气泡内包含日语文本。第一个气泡内容为：「日本語の幼稚園の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」。下方是一个圆角矩形的生成图像预览，展示了 2x2 的幼儿园广告变体，采用柔和的粉彩色调。左上角面板展示一张明亮通风的广告，右侧为幼儿侧脸特写，柔和阳光，奶油色和淡绿色调，左侧为手写风格的日语标题，底部有小圆形徽章和花卉装饰。右上角面板展示一张充满活力的户外广告，4 名儿童在蓝天下奔跑，醒目的日语标题，青色和黄色图形装饰，以及一个黄色圆形标注。左下角面板展示现代幼儿园校园建筑，带有草坪和玩耍的儿童，左侧有大的白色气泡状文本区域，以及柔和的绿米色抽象形状。右下角面板展示一棵插画风格的大绿树，树下有儿童和家长，天蓝色背景，温馨的家庭向日语文案，以及柔和的圆形装饰形状。在此预览的左下角添加 1 个标有「編集」的小灰色圆形覆盖按钮，右下角添加 1 个半透明的小圆形上传/分享图标。在此第一个预览下方，包含 4 个并排的小界面图标：复制、点赞、点踩和更多选项。屏幕下方显示第二个右对齐的浅灰色聊天气泡，内容为：「日本語の健康食品の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」。下方是第二个圆角矩形的生成图像预览，展示了 2x2 的健康食品广告变体。左上角面板展示一张简洁的健康广告，采用白色和淡绿色，一名女性手触颈部，日语标题关于内在平衡，带有多个圆形益处图标和价格文本。右上角面板展示一张黑金配色的高端补品广告，带有深色袋装包装，发光的金色颗粒，奢华的衬线体日语文本，以及一个标有 980 円的醒目红橙色价格标签。左下角面板展示一张柔和的粉色美容补品广告，带有半透明花卉或结晶纹理，粉彩包装，精致的日语文案，圆形信息徽章和女性化化妆品风格。右下角面板展示一张天然绿汁广告，配有一杯高大的绿色果昔，背景为新鲜蔬菜，带有绿白相间的产品盒，简洁的日语健康文案，以及一个黄色圆形标注。在此第二个预览的左下角添加 1 个标有「編集」的小灰色圆形覆盖按钮，右下角添加 1 个半透明的小圆形上传/分享图标。整体图像应呈现为逼真的 AI 图像生成聊天手机应用截图，两次对话之间留有充足的间距，圆角设计，清晰的日语排版，以及高端现代的 UI。

title: この商品広告をプロのデザイナー目線でリデザインして。
