今のトレンド、ターゲットに合わせた洗練されたデザインで。

title: Japanese Fuji film style portrait
author: BubbleBrain
prompt:
9:16 vertical — {argument name="film style" default="Japanese Fuji film style"} portrait, single subject

Fujifilm analog aesthetic (Pro 400H / Superia feel), soft pastel tones, slight green-magenta shift, low contrast, gentle highlight roll-off, fine film grain, subtle halation

early morning indoor setting near window, soft curtains, fresh daylight

{argument name="subject" default="young Japanese female idol"}, natural minimal makeup, soft fresh skin texture

outfit: oversized shirt with loose shorts, relaxed homewear style, non-revealing

hair: slightly messy, natural volume, just-woke-up feeling

pose: sitting on bed edge or by window, body slightly leaning forward, shoulders relaxed; one hand loosely holding a small flower or fabric, the other resting naturally

expression: soft, slightly sleepy gaze, calm and natural

lighting: {argument name="lighting" default="soft morning light"}, diffused, gentle shadows

mood: quiet, fresh, intimate everyday moment

quality: ultra-realistic, film grain, slight softness, natural imperfections

title: 末日废土风战术动漫少女
author: 天の川かえで
prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of a young girl with {argument name="character hair" default="short brown hair with cat ears"} and blue eyes standing in a {argument name="setting" default="post-apocalyptic wasteland"}. She is wearing a {argument name="character outfit" default="white short-sleeve shirt, blue plaid pleated skirt, black thigh-high socks with white stripes, and a heavy tactical chest rig"}, equipped with a backpack, a wrist-mounted retro-futuristic computer device, and a katana strapped to her waist. The background features a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. To her right is a heavily rusted brick building with a large, weathered red sign on the roof partially reading "{argument name="sign text" default="RED R"}" alongside a red rocket sculpture. In the foreground, there is a rusted bright blue metal container cart, and to the left, a dilapidated, rusted blue car sits among dry, overgrown weeds and debris. The scene combines vibrant anime character design with detailed, realistic textures of rust and decay.

title: 电影感书法肖像
author: Joe
prompt: A highly realistic, cinematic photograph of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} wearing {argument name="clothing" default="traditional black and white Hanfu"}, sitting at a dark wooden desk in a dimly lit traditional study. She holds a calligraphy brush in her right hand, poised over a blank scroll, while resting her chin on her left hand with a {argument name="expression" default="thoughtful and contemplative"} look directed toward a lattice window on the right. The background features a large wall hanging covered in {argument name="background calligraphy" default="traditional Chinese calligraphy"}. The scene is illuminated by {argument name="lighting style" default="dramatic cinematic lighting with warm and cool contrast"}, featuring a warm glow from a traditional paper lantern on the left and cool natural light streaming from the window. The desk is adorned with an inkstone, a blue and white porcelain brush holder, and a small potted plant, creating a rich, moody atmosphere with exquisite textures.

title: 从航天器视角拍摄的月球与地球电影级画面
author: Johnny Wang
prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic wide-angle shot from inside a spacecraft looking out a circular window into the deep blackness of space. On the left side of the frame, a {argument name="celestial body left" default="massive, highly detailed crescent Moon"} dominates the view, showcasing intricate craters and rugged terrain illuminated by harsh sunlight. On the right side, a smaller {argument name="celestial body right" default="crescent Earth"} glows with blue oceans and white atmospheric clouds. In the immediate foreground on the far left, an {argument name="foreground element" default="astronaut's arm wearing a dark blue spacesuit"} is visible, featuring a prominent {argument name="patch logo" default="NASA"} patch on the shoulder. The astronaut is holding a digital tablet with a glowing blue, complex user interface. The edge of the spacecraft window frames the scene, with subtle lens flares and reflections on the glass adding to the immersive, sci-fi documentary aesthetic. High contrast, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.

title: 森林小径上的动漫精灵少女
author: tigerh
prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of an {argument name="character description" default="anime elf girl with silver twin braids and green eyes"}. She has pale skin, pointed elf ears adorned with red drop earrings, and a calm, neutral expression as she looks slightly upward. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="white capelet with gold trim and red gems over a black and white striped shirt"}. The scene is set outdoors during the daytime with beautiful dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy of a large tree on the right, casting soft shadows on her face and clothes. She stands on a cobblestone path lined with green grass and small white flowers. To her left is a rustic wooden signpost with three directional planks bearing the text {argument name="signpost text top" default="北側諸国"}, {argument name="signpost text middle" default="グラナト山"}, and {argument name="signpost text bottom" default="オイサースト"}. In the blurred background, a picturesque fantasy town with a castle sits on a lush green hill under a bright sky.

title: 移动端 AI 对话截图与 Transformer 海报
author: マシモGPT🤖@ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/GrokなどLLMをこねくり回す人
prompt: 一张竖屏智能手机应用截图，展示了日语 AI 聊天界面，采用简洁的白色背景和 iOS 风格顶部栏。最上方显示左侧汉堡菜单图标、蓝色文字“Thinking”及右侧箭头、编辑撰写图标以及三点菜单。下方显示一个巨大的圆角浅灰色聊天气泡，包含 6 行日语文本，内容如下：「モーフ感浮遊感のある感じ＋かつ反射するダストのレイヤーを加えて。テキスト多め、重要ーアーキテクチャは可読性高め、精細で細かいコードや数式の可読性は二の次のデザインアクセント＆アートエレメンツで。」气泡下方显示一行浅灰色系统小字“Thought for a couple of seconds”，接着是一行较大的灰色日语文字“画像が作成されました”。在下半部分，展示 1 个圆角生成的图像缩略图：一张关于 Transformer 神经网络架构的密集型未来感信息图海报，渲染为发光的霓虹科幻全息 UI 艺术。海报背景为深邃的宇宙空间，带有星星、紫色、洋红色、蓝色和青色的光轨、反射粒子、体积光以及漂浮的几何晶体。海报左上角有大标题“TRANSFORMER”，副标题为“THE ARCHITECTURE”。包含 2 个巨大的中央发光框，分别标注为“ENCODER LAYER”和“DECODER LAYER”，通过箭头和较小的模块连接，标注为“ENCODER STACK (N×)”和“DECODER STACK (N×)”。添加许多周围的标注面板和公式，包括“KEY INNOVATIONS”、“WHY TRANSFORMERS?”、“POSITIONAL ENCODING”、“FEED FORWARD NETWORK”、“COMPUTATIONAL COMPLEXITY”、“OVERALL FLOW”、“SELF-ATTENTION MECHANISM”、“MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION”、“APPLICATIONS”和“MODEL SCALING”等部分。底部显示 Token 行，包括类似“[CLS] the cat sat on the mat [SEP]”的英语输入序列，以及以“[EOS]”结尾的类法语输出序列。通篇添加微小的图表、公式、注意力机制图和连线，但整体观感应偏向艺术化和发光效果，而非严格的可读性。在海报缩略图底部中心，叠加一个带有黑色向下箭头的白色圆形下载按钮。整体截图应呈现出真实的移动端 ChatGPT 风格界面，展示 AI 生成的图像结果，清晰且现代。

title: 大学校园航拍图
author: λhmet Kamer e/acc
prompt: An aerial drone photograph of a sprawling, lush green university campus on a sunny day. In the foreground, a wide multi-lane road with cars passes through a large concrete entrance gate bearing the large white text "{argument name="university name" default="ODTÜ METÜ"}". To the right of the gate, two tall flagpoles fly a {argument name="flag 1" default="Turkish flag"} and a {argument name="flag 2" default="white flag with a red circular logo"}. The midground features a long rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by green lawns and pedestrian paths, flanked by various modernist concrete academic buildings. Notable structures include a cylindrical building with red and white horizontal stripes on the left and a large pyramid-shaped building on the right. In the background, a dense city skyline representing {argument name="city skyline" default="Ankara"} stretches across the horizon, featuring a prominent tall observation tower, backed by rolling hills and mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered white clouds.

title: 极繁主义“创造万物”海报
author: Weplash⚡️
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张构图丰富、层次分明的极繁主义拼贴海报，采用纵向布局，旨在歌颂艺术、科学、历史与人类创造力。在正中央放置一个巨大的不规则黑色墨迹或撕纸留白，周围环绕着放射状的多彩条纹，留白处以优雅的大号衬线字体书写着 Create Everything at Once，字体颜色为暖象牙色。在中心周围，以密集的剪贴簿风格排列 33 个清晰可见的物品，边缘相互重叠，如同一个精心策划的 mood board：左上角是一页带有华丽花卉边框的精美中世纪手稿，旁边是一张植物学蘑菇研究图，一张星图或天文图页，顶部正中是一张太阳系插图，行星轨道线映衬在深邃的太空中，中左侧是一张元素周期表，中右侧是一张圆形夜空星座图，一簇蓝色晶体，一幅高山风景油画，右上角是一块几何马赛克瓷砖碎片，右边缘是一个青花瓷茶壶，右中是一个古老的部落面具，一张撕裂的垂直书法页，上面有多种语言文字，一个小型的等轴测多面体或宝石绘图，一张像素艺术火箭图标卡片，一个带有箭头和交通符号的多彩导视牌，右侧是一张黑白建筑草图，右下边缘是一根虹彩羽毛，右下角是一张水下珊瑚礁照片，一簇紫色紫水晶，一个三角形几何马赛克纺织品或瓷砖图案，一个彩色编织纺织品样本，一个圆形雕刻石历盘，一张黑白城市天际线印刷品，底部中心附近是一幅植物花卉绘图，一张彩色玻璃窗插图，一张蓝色建筑蓝图，一张色轮图，一张抽象的蓝色细胞状或矿物显微照片，左下角是一幅“神奈川冲浪里”风格的日本海景印刷品，一个古希腊陶器碎片，左侧是一幅人体肌肉解剖插图，一张蝴蝶标本卡片，以及中心左侧的一台复古银色相机。在左下中心附近添加第二个小型植物花卉草图，并在相机区域后方塞入一张羊皮纸地图碎片作为细微的填充物，同时保持主要展示对象总数为 33 个。融合多种媒介风格，包括版画、科学图表、复古印刷品、美术绘画、摄影、纺织图案、蓝图和数字设计 UI。在左下角附近，加入 1 个深色计算机界面面板，显示基于节点的创意软件和带有图表及圆形颜色选择器的调色工具，暗示现代 AI 辅助创作。使用撕纸边缘、陈旧的羊皮纸纹理、墨渍、饱和的宝石色调、深蓝色、金色、奶油色，以及点缀的霓虹青色、洋红色、橙色和紫色。整体构图应显得生机勃勃、充满智慧且富有启发性，每个物体都清晰可辨，并精心排列成一个博物馆与工作室相结合的无缝拼贴画。高细节，编辑海报设计，高级印刷质感，平衡的混乱感，强烈的对比，柔和的纸张阴影，通过层叠重叠产生微妙的深度，拼贴画之外无空白背景。

title: 动漫风格奇幻夜间城堡
author: ゆきしたミノル@動画
prompt: A high-quality {argument name="art style" default="anime background art"} illustration of a sprawling fantasy castle complex at {argument name="time of day" default="night"}. The sky is deep blue, filled with sparkling stars and a {argument name="celestial object" default="large full moon"} positioned in the upper left. The architecture consists of light gray stone walls, featuring exactly 8 prominent cylindrical towers with {argument name="roof color" default="blue"} conical roofs, and a main rectangular building with a matching pitched roof. {argument name="window light color" default="warm yellow"} light warmly illuminates the windows, creating a striking contrast against the cool night palette. Elevated stone walkways bridge the gaps between the towers. The central courtyard is paved with neat stone tiles, featuring a single small white cube resting mysteriously in the middle. The fortress is nestled within dense, dark green forests, with rolling mountain silhouettes fading into the distant background.

title: VTuber Stream Thumbnail
author: 結パパ
prompt: An anime-style YouTube stream thumbnail featuring a cheerful female VTuber. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="pink with light blue inner highlights"} hair, blue eyes, and wears black and white cat-ear headphones with a boom mic. She wears a white collared shirt with a black and pink star ribbon and a black choker, smiling with one hand near her chin. The background is a gaming room with {argument name="room lighting" default="purple and blue neon"} lighting, showing a desk equipped with 1 white keyboard, 1 mug, 1 glowing cat figure, 1 game controller, and 1 streaming microphone. The left side features large, bold, pop-art Japanese typography: a bright pink top word "{argument name="main text line 1" default="雑談"}" and a bright blue bottom word "{argument name="main text line 2" default="配信"}". Below is a pink banner reading "{argument name="subtitle text" default="今夜もゆるっとトーク!"}". A red "LIVE" badge sits in the top left. Floating speech bubbles, stars, and hearts decorate the composition.

title: 柔粉与银色华丽风格迁移
author: たねもみ 2.0 / Tanemomi Ver2.0
prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the image's aesthetic to a highly detailed, ornate fantasy style. Change the entire color palette from warm reds and blacks to {argument name="color palette" default="pastel pink, white, and silver"}. Convert the character's dark clothing into a lavish white garment featuring {argument name="clothing details" default="pink floral embroidery and heavy silver filigree"}. Replace her hair accessories with elaborate pink roses, white pearls, and silver ornaments. In the background, transform the 3 prominent hanging lanterns into {argument name="lantern style" default="white and pink ornate lanterns with tassels"}. Cover the surrounding street and buildings with {argument name="environment details" default="white and pink blossoms and intricate silver architectural elements"}. Adjust the lighting to a {argument name="lighting" default="bright, soft, ethereal daylight"}. Preserve the character's original pose, facial expression, and the overall structural composition of the scene.

title: 架空のアニメ映画のポスターをGPT image2で作成。
author: seiiiiiiiiiiru
prompt: 架空のアニメ映画のポスターをGPT image2で作成。

title: 精致单色天使线条艺术
author: SHINTARO
prompt: A highly detailed, intricate {argument name="art style" default="black and white line art illustration"} of an {argument name="subject" default="anime-style angel"}. She has long, flowing wavy hair adorned with a {argument name="headpiece" default="floral crown of roses and lilies"} and is looking directly at the viewer with large, expressive eyes. Her {argument name="pose" default="hands are clasped together in prayer"}. She has large, feathered angel wings extending from her back and wears an incredibly ornate dress completely covered in dense floral patterns, lace, and filigree, along with a detailed jeweled choker and dangling earrings. Behind her head is a radiant, glowing halo with straight, sunburst-like lines. The entire background is filled with symmetrical, baroque-style floral and vine filigree, creating a dense, tapestry-like frame. The style is strictly monochrome, resembling a highly complex ink drawing, engraving, or an intricate adult coloring book page, with meticulous linework.

title: Neon Lip Balm 新品发布广告
author: Canva
prompt: 创作一张光泽感强、色彩高度饱和的未来感美妆产品发布社交媒体广告海报，设计风格类似于 Canva 营销图。构图为一个居中的宽屏促销横幅，背景为青色到紫色的渐变，带有圆角和鲜艳的霓虹粉色调。横幅内展示一位年轻女性的半身像，背景是一个由同心粉色和白色光环组成的科幻发光隧道。她的脸部被一个柔和的方形模糊块遮挡，发型为两个小发髻，佩戴圆环耳环、多层链条项链，身穿金属银色上衣和虹彩粉色全息夹克。她向镜头伸出一只手，手中拿着一支透明润唇膏管靠近镜头，营造出强烈的近景透视感。管身标签写着“GLOW MODE Lip Balm”。顶部中央，醒目的霓虹大标题写着“GLOW MODE”，下方配有手写体副标题“Lip Balm”，再下方有一行小字写着“JUICY SHINE. HYDRATING CARE. ZERO STICKINESS.”。在左上角，添加一个手写风格的霓虹标签，写着“NEW!”。在右上角，放置一个橙色圆角贴纸，上面有白色文字“gpt-image-2”，下方配有一个小的橙色指针标签。在横幅右侧，包含 2 个圆形标注徽章：一个写着“ONLY $14.99”的粉色星爆徽章，以及一个写着“VIRAL ON TikTok 2M+ views”的黑色发光圆形徽章。在右下角，展示 2 个产品陈列元素：一支直立的开口润唇膏管及其涂抹棒，旁边放着一个完整的桃子和半个切开的芒果，配有绿叶，所有物品都放置在带有粉色光漩涡的光滑反射面上。在底部中央，添加 3 个带有标签的功能图标：一个标有“HYALURONIC HYDRATION”的水滴图标，一个标有“PEACH MANGO SCENT”的水果图标，以及一个标有“100% VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE”的兔子图标。在横幅左下角，添加一列垂直堆叠的 3 个社交媒体按钮，包含平台图标和账号：TikTok 账号“#GlowMode”、Instagram 账号“@LunaBeatty”和 Snapchat 账号“@LunaGlow”。在它们下方放置一张发光的二维码卡片，旁边配有手写体文字“Shop Now!”以及指向二维码的箭头。在横幅外部左下角，放置一个倾斜的青色圆角标签，上面写着“Canva AI”，附近有一个小的青色纸飞机风格装饰。整体添加光泽反射、镜头光晕、辉光、霓虹轮廓光、闪光点和精致的广告设计风格，融合清晰的商业产品摄影与未来感图形设计。

title: 两位女性在复古商店购物
author: のるま
prompt: A photorealistic candid photograph of two Asian women shopping together inside a densely packed {argument name="store type" default="vintage clothing store"}. The woman on the left has brown hair tied back and is wearing a {argument name="left woman outfit" default="white ribbed crop top and distressed denim shorts"}, carrying a cream shoulder bag. She is holding up a {argument name="item being examined" default="dark blue satin souvenir jacket with intricate gold embroidery"} on a wooden hanger. The woman on the right has her hair in a messy bun and is wearing a {argument name="right woman outfit" default="white graphic t-shirt tucked into high-waisted blue jeans"}, looking admiringly at the jacket. They are standing in a narrow aisle flanked by overflowing racks of colorful garments, with more clothes hanging from the ceiling. The scene features {argument name="lighting and atmosphere" default="warm, slightly dim ambient lighting with a shallow depth of field blurring the background"}.

title: 超现实冰洞闪光灯摄影
author: Riccardo Wolf
prompt: A realistic image shot with {argument name="lighting style" default="harsh direct flash photography"} inside an {argument name="environment" default="ice cave made of large ice blocks and snow"}. A young man with messy dark curly hair sits on a brown fur pelt, leaning his head on his hand with a relaxed expression. He is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="thick black and white patterned knit sweater"}, black snow pants, and black winter boots. Directly behind him, the rear half of a white {argument name="car model" default="Porsche 911 GT3 RS"} sports car is embedded into the snowy cave wall, with its red taillights illuminated and a license plate reading {argument name="license plate" default="VS 369 911"}. In the foreground, a rough wooden table dusted with snow holds exactly 2 stainless steel thermoses, 1 clear textured glass, 1 small metal cooking pot, and 1 yellow and blue matchbox. Resting on the icy floor to the right are 1 green glass bottle and 1 vintage metal lantern.

title: Y2K 青少年杂志风格摄影棚肖像
author: MiraiMosaic
prompt: A studio portrait of two young East Asian adults standing back-to-back against a {argument name="background color" default="bright pink to white gradient"} backdrop. The photo features a {argument name="photography style" default="Y2K nostalgic 90s teen magazine aesthetic with soft focus, film grain, and a glowing bloom effect"}. On the left, a young woman with long dark hair smiles gently at the camera. She wears a layered outfit featuring a {argument name="woman's outfit" default="light green graphic t-shirt over pink long sleeves, a short skirt, and chunky sneakers"}, and holds a smartphone in her hand. On the right, a young man with short dark hair looks {argument name="man's expression" default="excited with his mouth open"}, raising one fist in the air. He wears a {argument name="man's outfit" default="baggy purple t-shirt with yellow trim, loose blue jeans, and a silver chain necklace"}, and also holds a smartphone. The camera angle is slightly high, looking down at the subjects.

title: 动漫风格星空与自定义文字
author: Fandu
prompt: A breathtaking anime-style landscape featuring a vibrant, starry night sky dominated by a brilliant, sweeping Milky Way in hues of deep purple, blue, and magenta. Two prominent shooting stars, one glowing bright blue and the other a softer pinkish-red, streak downwards across the sky, their tails intersecting. In the center of the sky, written in elegant, glowing cursive neon-like script, is the text "{argument name="custom text" default="Your Name"}", underlined by a delicate pink line that forms a small bow in the middle. Below, a serene landscape unfolds with dark, silhouetted clouds framing the edges. A distant town with glowing city lights sits nestled along the shores of a calm lake, reflecting the twilight colors of the horizon where the sun has just set, leaving a gradient of pink and orange. The foreground features dark silhouettes of grassy hills and subtle hints of purple flowers, adding depth to this magical, cinematic scene reminiscent of Makoto Shinkai's art style.

title: 西部开放世界游戏截图
author: kei
prompt: A highly realistic video game screenshot in the style of a {argument name="game style" default="Western open-world game"}. Third-person over-the-shoulder view of a rugged cowboy walking away from the camera, wearing a weathered brown jacket, dark pants, a gun holster, and a classic cowboy hat. To his left is a saddled {argument name="horse type" default="dark horse with white spots"}. The setting is a {argument name="environment" default="dusty desert landscape with dry tall grass, dirt trails, cacti, and towering red rock mesas"} during a {argument name="time of day" default="vibrant golden hour sunset"}. In the hazy background, two distant silhouetted figures stand on the dirt path. The image features a video game HUD overlay: in the bottom left corner, a circular minimap with a player arrow and two red blips; in the bottom right corner, three lines of white text with button prompt icons reading 'DRAW WEAPON [RT]', 'HORSE CARGO [Cross D-pad]', and 'TENNESSEE WALKER [LT]'.

title: 名人快餐店员工抓拍
author: Ellis
prompt: A photorealistic candid photograph of {argument name="person" default="Sam Altman"} working behind the counter at a {argument name="restaurant brand" default="McDonald's"} restaurant. He is wearing a dark grey short-sleeve t-shirt under a black apron with yellow neck straps and the restaurant's logo, along with a white nametag reading "{argument name="nametag text" default="Sam"}". He has a slightly tired, focused expression, holding a {argument name="held item" default="red carton of french fries"} in his left hand while extending his right hand forward to serve a {argument name="served item" default="white drink cup with a straw"}. The background features a realistic, slightly blurred fast-food kitchen environment with stainless steel counters, a fry station glowing under warm heat lamps, digital order screens, a point-of-sale register, and another employee working in the distance. The lighting is typical indoor fluorescent, giving the image a documentary, everyday feel.

title: 3D 抽象数据流水线可视化
author: キヨ｜AI全振り社長
prompt: A clean, minimalist 3D render visualizing a {argument name="concept" default="neural network data processing pipeline"}. On the left, a single white cable with a glowing {argument name="accent color" default="blue"} tip splits into multiple thin, sweeping white strands. These strands feed into a linear sequence of exactly 10 transparent, glass-like rectangular panels standing upright on a {argument name="environment" default="sterile white stepped surface"}. Each glass panel illustrates a different stage of transformation using geometric patterns in white and {argument name="accent color" default="blue"}. From left to right, the panels feature: floating dashes, a 3x3 grid of concentric circles, a dense dot matrix, scattered white pixel blocks, horizontal dashed lines, a fine mesh grid, and finally 3D cubic structures. The lighting is bright, soft, and high-key, creating a pristine corporate tech aesthetic with a shallow depth of field that gently blurs the furthest panels.

title: 3D 动画风格动物办公室邂逅

The fox is smirking with one hand in his pocket, wearing a {argument name="fox outfit" default="teal open shirt over a white t-shirt, white pants, and a gold chain"}. They are standing in a modern, upscale office lobby. On the left wall, a metallic 3D star logo reads "{argument name="company name" default="Paw Star ENTERTAINMENT"}" above a sleek reception desk. The background features a black leather sofa, a potted plant, and wall decor including {argument name="background decor" default="3 framed gold records and 2 framed posters featuring the fox"}. The image features detailed fur textures, realistic clothing materials, and soft, professional studio lighting typical of modern animated feature films.

title: 日式书店室内设计
author: 🌈naomi🌈e/acc
prompt: A photorealistic interior view of a bustling {argument name="store type" default="Japanese bookstore"}. The scene is illuminated by {argument name="lighting style" default="warm overhead lighting"} that reflects off the polished wooden floor. In the foreground, large wooden display tables are stacked high with books, many featuring anime-style illustrated covers facing outward. Above the shelves, prominent hanging signs display Japanese text, including a red sign on the left reading {argument name="left sign text" default="新刊コーナー"} and a blue sign on the right reading {argument name="right sign text" default="旅行ガイド"}. A central hanging directional sign points towards different sections. Tall wooden bookshelves packed tightly with colorful spines line the walls, creating deep aisles. In the mid-ground, a {argument name="customer description" default="woman in a green top browsing"} stands looking at the shelves. The atmosphere is cozy, inviting, and highly detailed.

title: 照片级写实躺姿肖像
author: Andy Chow
prompt: A highly detailed, photorealistic portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="beautiful young Asian woman"} reclining gracefully on a {argument name="furniture" default="white modern sofa"}. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="short white silk slip dress"} with thin straps, her {argument name="hair style" default="long wavy dark brown hair"} cascading softly over a white pillow. Her pose is relaxed and intimate, with one arm raised elegantly above her head and the other hand resting gently on her stomach, as she gazes directly at the camera with a soft, alluring expression. The scene is illuminated by {argument name="lighting style" default="soft natural sunlight streaming through a window"}, casting gentle, diffused shadows across her flawless skin and the pristine white upholstery. The aesthetic is bright, minimalist, and ethereal, captured with an 85mm lens for a cinematic, shallow depth of field and soft, glowing highlights.

title: Woman Dancing in Black Dress
author: 蒼井　詠@AIで効率化する女
prompt: A dramatic full-body photo of a woman dancing powerfully in a dark upscale lounge or bar, wearing a sleek black evening dress with a high slit and flowing velvet-like fabric that whips outward with her movement. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair flying to one side, a slim athletic figure, and small hoop earrings. Capture her in a confident, stylish dance pose with one arm raised gracefully above her head and the other curved downward, torso turned in profile, emphasizing elegance and motion. The setting is dim and cinematic with warm amber practical lights, soft bokeh, and a blurred audience in the background, including a few seated onlookers and a glowing television screen off to the left. The mood is cool, sensual, and high-end, with strong contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin, subtle motion in the dress hem, and fashion-editorial lighting. Photorealistic, dynamic nightlife photography, vertical composition.

title: Confused Blonde Anime Girl Portrait
author: Torishima / INTP
prompt: A soft, minimalist anime portrait of a cute young woman from the waist up against a plain light gray background, drawn in a clean pastel style with very thin sketch-like line art and flat gentle colors. She has long, flowing pale blonde hair with soft layers and long front bangs partially covering her forehead, large round light-blue eyes, fair skin, and a small slightly open mouth conveying mild confusion. She is wearing an oversized loose {argument name="clothing color" default="light pastel blue"} long-sleeve top with a wide relaxed neckline. Her pose is slightly angled toward the viewer, with one hand raised and one index finger touching the side of her head as if puzzled. Place exactly 1 floating blue question mark near the upper left side of her head. The expression should feel innocent, absentminded, and endearing. Keep the composition centered, airy, and uncluttered, with no extra objects, no detailed background, and no strong shadows.

title: 可爱兔子平假名海报
author: Eni係鬼
prompt: 提示词翻译前创作一张可爱的日语学前班平假名海报，采用柔和的水彩绘本风格，背景为温暖的纹理羊皮纸。整体构图为垂直教育图表，带有由草地、花朵、蘑菇、蝴蝶和小鸡组成的奇幻春日边框，设计风格如同儿童教室的学习单。在顶部放置一个木质招牌标题，上面写着色彩鲜艳的圆润日语文字 うさぎのひらがな表，并装饰有 2 只白色兔子吉祥物，一只坐在左侧，另一只从右侧探出头来，招牌周围点缀着小花和叶子。在标题下方，排列一个 5 行 8 列的整洁网格，共 40 个方形单元格，每个单元格在奶油色背景上用细棕色线条勾勒。在每个单元格中，顶部放置一个大的亮色平假名字符，下方放置一个小的可爱兔子插图，每只兔子都在表演或拿着与下方文字相关联的物品。为许多平假名字符使用不同的欢快颜色，包括红色、橙色、黄色、绿色、蓝色和紫色，并使用手绘圆润字体。保持文字和插图完全如下，按行从左到右排列：第 1 行有 8 个单元格，标记为 あ、い、う、う、え、え、お、お，对应单词为 あめ、いい、いい、うさぎ、えんぴつ、えんぴつ、おやすり、おにぎり；第 2 行有 8 个单元格，标记为 か、き、く、け、せ、せ、そ、そ，对应单词为 きくら、たま、サベツン、ケーキ、せんせい、そう、そう、しょうこう；第 3 行有 8 个单元格，标记为 た、ち、ち、つ、て、て、と、と，对应单词为 たまご、たまご、ちびこ、つと、てんとうむし、てしなを、とうこ、ほしい；第 4 行有 8 个单元格，标记为 な、に、ぬ、ふ、め、ね、の、ほ，对应单词为 まな、ひこうき、みんきう、ふたう、てつ、へびす、ようこ、ほし；第 5 行有 8 个单元格，标记为 ま、み、む、る、れ、れ、ろ、ん，对应单词为 わた、まくら、みかん、むぎぎ、めがみ、もも、ろうた、ん。兔子插图应多样且可爱：例如拿着雨伞、抱着葡萄、用铅笔画画、吃饭团、坐在樱花树下、站在伞下、拿着水果、吃蛋糕、打扮成老师、拿着花、在蓝色毯子下睡觉、搬运鸡蛋、拥抱番茄、拿着草莓、吹泡泡、戴着蓝色帽子、拿着橘子、坐在棉花旁、在木桶里洗澡以及拿着糖果。保持柔和的粉彩色调、柔和的阴影、圆圆的脸蛋、红润的脸颊和细腻的墨线。整体感觉应怀旧、迷人、具有教育意义、高度细致，非常适合作为幼儿园墙面图表或日语学习演示文稿的可爱 Slides 封面。

title: YouTube 直播界面模型
author: Marouane Lamharzi Alaoui

title: 2026 年马来西亚旅游海报
author: Jeffrey
prompt: 提示词翻译前一款为 马来西亚 设计的奢华旅游海报，采用竖版艺术旅行广告风格，背景为干净的象牙白纹理，并带有精致的浮雕装饰图案。画面构图围绕一条飘逸的红金相间蜡染丝带展开，丝带呈对角线螺旋贯穿页面，形成优雅的 S 型曲线，巧妙地串联起如梦似幻的地标、文化与自然景观拼贴。左上角，温暖的金色晨曦洒在云雾缭绕的热带山脉和雨林之上，瀑布飞流直下，茂密的棕榈树旁，一只巨大的犀鸟栖息在木槿花和白色热带花卉间。上方中央，吉隆坡天际线在薄雾中升起，以双峰塔（Petronas Twin Towers）为主体，隐约可见吉隆坡塔（KL Tower）及多座现代摩天大楼。右上角附近漂浮着 1 只色彩斑斓的传统月亮风筝（Wau kite），在留白的背景中格外醒目。中左侧包含 1 座坐落在棕榈树与烟雾中的宏伟清真寺，拥有多个圆顶和尖塔。中右侧包含历史悠久的苏丹阿都沙末大厦（Sultan Abdul Samad Building），展现其铜制圆顶与钟楼。左下方包含 1 列穿行于城市中的红银相间高架列车。底部中央展示 1 座装饰华丽的唐人街牌坊，标有“Jalan Petaling”字样，点缀着红灯笼和熙熙攘攘的行人。右下方描绘了黑风洞（Batu Caves）区域，包括 1 座高耸的金色姆鲁干神像和 1 条通往石灰岩悬崖的陡峭彩虹阶梯，周围人群攒动。右下角点缀着 1 座景观城市公园，配有绿松石色的湖泊与喷泉。紫色兰花和热带花卉穿插在丝带与前景的多处。最右下角展示 1 位身着红金服饰的传统舞者，正舞动着丝带的末端。整幅拼贴画应呈现出明亮、超细节、宏伟且充满庆典感的氛围，将写实建筑与绘画感旅行海报风格相结合，辅以柔和的云雾、大气层薄雾和发光高光。左下方添加优雅的海报排版：主标题为 VISIT MALAYSIA 2026，较小的地点行显示为 KUALA LUMPUR，蓝色的手写体旅游标语为 Malaysia Truly Asia，下方附带一行精致的小副标题：Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia。采用金色、深红、象牙白、祖母绿、天蓝和热带绿的高端配色方案，呈现出精美的编辑级构图与高端目的地品牌美学。

RADIANT. UNFORGETTABLE."} in a clean, spaced-out font.

title: 伪造抖音老干妈直播间截图
author: 李谱Mars
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张深色模式下中国短视频直播带货界面的逼真手机截图模型，背景为炭黑色。在整体画布的右上角，放置一个圆角深色聊天气泡，其中包含中文文本 帮我生成一张马斯克在带货老干妈的抖音直播间截图，其右侧带有 2 个用于复制和编辑的小型界面图标。在左下角区域，显示一个带有黑色边框和圆角的 iPhone 风格直播屏幕，时间显示为 20:30。直播间来自老干妈官方旗舰店，包含中文个人资料名称行、蓝色认证徽章、红色关注按钮，以及顶部显示 3 个圆形头像、10 万+ 观看人数、关闭图标和“更多直播”按钮的状态栏。在顶部附近添加排名文本，如“带货总榜第 1 名”和“人气第 1 名”。主视频画面显示 Elon Musk 在一个类似高端产品直播间的昏暗暖色调摄影棚中，身穿黑色衬衫，右手拿着一大瓶老干妈辣酱，左手指向它。他的脸部经过矩形马赛克模糊处理。在他身后，包含一个发着红橙色光的霓虹灯牌，写着“老干妈 / LAO GAN MA / 国民辣酱”，货架上摆放着几瓶辣酱，一个带框的肖像标志，右侧还有一株深色叶片植物。叠加典型的直播 UI 元素：在左侧，有 2 个带有用户名和 x66、x88 计数的悬浮礼物/评论气泡；下方是一个显示 35 和“加入了直播间”的紫色胶囊状图标。添加一个包含 5 行可见聊天记录的滚动评论区，其中包括中文用户名，以及一行来自 Elon Musk 的英文评论：“It's awesome! Very delicious!”，随后跟着一行表示他每天都买的中文评论。在视频区域的右上角，添加一个粉红色促销横幅，提及“抖音 618 好物节”和“618 元消费券”。在右下角，放置一个带有“热卖 x9999+”标签的产品卡片，展示 3 瓶老干妈和一碗辣椒调料，产品标题为“老干妈 风味豆豉油辣椒 280g*3 瓶”，带有小型保障标签，以及一个 ¥39.9 的大价格和红色购买按钮。在手机屏幕底部，包含 5 个导航/操作区域：左侧的编辑风格按钮、文本输入提示、购物车图标、心形/礼物图标对，以及分享箭头图标。整体风格：超逼真的 App 截图，可信的中国电商直播 UI，高细节，视频流中电影般的暖色调灯光，简洁现代的移动界面，视觉上令人信服的社交电商截图。

title: 日式居酒屋 Highball 海报
author: 蓮華＠AIおもしろ研究者
prompt: 一张照片级逼真的日式居酒屋宣传海报，呈现出温暖且具有电影感的夜晚氛围，设计风格类似于街边餐厅的传单。构图为垂直且层次丰富。右侧是一位留着深棕色至黑色长直发的年轻日本女性，身穿修身黑色罗纹高领毛衣，半身出镜，右手在胸前位置握着一个盛满金色 Highball 的大号冰镇玻璃杯，杯中冰块清晰可见。她姿态放松且亲切，看向镜头，营造出柔和的夜生活氛围。背景是狭窄的传统居酒屋外观或巷弄场景，充满了温暖的橙色灯笼光影，景深较浅，挂着写有日文手写书法的木质菜单牌，充满怀旧的下班后热闹气息。左上方是一个占据画面主导地位的做旧深色木质招牌，上面用醒目的白色笔触写着汉字“蓮華食堂”，上方有小号平假名“れんげしょくどう”，下方有一条红色笔触绘制的横幅，写着“大衆居酒屋”。在左侧中部下方，放置一块大型奶油色纸张或绘图板，以超大号书法字体展示特价饮品：上方为“ハイボール”，下方是巨大的红色“198円”，价格旁附有小号黑色“（税込）”，数字采用充满活力的笔触风格。在最右侧边缘，添加垂直的白色日文文字“今日も一日、おつかれさまです。”。在右下方女性躯干上方，放置一个红色圆形印章式徽章，上面以对角线和垂直排列着白色手写文字：“旨い！安い！居心地◎”。在底部前景，展示 4 道并排摆放在质朴陶瓷餐盘上的菜单菜品：1) 两串带有焦痕的烤鸡肉串，标注“焼き鳥 盛り合わせ”，价格 580 円；2) 一份包含金枪鱼、三文鱼、白身鱼、紫苏叶和芥末的刺身拼盘，标注“お刺身 盛り合わせ”，价格 780 円；3) 一盘配有柠檬角的日式炸鸡块，标注“若鶏の唐揚げ”，价格 480 円；4) 切片的出汁玉子烧，顶部撒有葱花并配有萝卜泥，标注“出汁巻き玉子”，价格 380 円。在左下角，加入一个发光的红色纸灯笼图形，上面有黑色垂直文字“居酒屋”。在底部中央的深色带状区域，添加醒目的白色粗体笔触文字“でかい！うまい！安い！”，下方配以较小的白色文字“みんなの憩いの場、蓮華食堂へようこそ！”。在顶部招牌附近添加一个装饰性的红色莲花状徽章，右下角也添加一个相同的徽章。采用丰富的琥珀色高光、强烈的对比度、光泽感十足的食物造型、逼真的皮肤和饮品质感、商业海报级的精致度，以及怀旧的昭和风居酒屋宣传美学。

title: 平面插画，东方幻想风格高端城市海报设计，竖版9:16构图，整体采用对角线+S型流动构图，从左下向右上延展，画面以深邃黑色为背景，自上而下渐变至浓烈暗红色，形成…
author: liyue_ai
prompt:
平面插画，东方幻想风格高端城市海报设计，竖版9:16构图，整体采用对角线+S型流动构图，从左下向右上延展，画面以深邃黑色为背景，自上而下渐变至浓烈暗红色，形成强烈冷暖对比与空间纵深，背景带微弱星尘与颗粒质感。画面中央一条金色流动能量线条如火焰般蜿蜒贯穿，自底部向上延伸，具有流体质感、粒子光效与渐变高光，局部带细微能量碎屑与体积光。

金色流光中逐层浮现广州城市地标建筑群：广州塔为视觉核心，比例突出，周围融合珠江新城高楼群、猎德大桥及现代与岭南建筑元素，建筑采用“精细线描 + 金色发光体块”表现，轮廓清晰、细节丰富，在金色光晕映衬下仿佛悬浮于虚空，形成超现实空间层次，远景轻微雾化增强纵深感。

画面底部为一位东方白发女性形象，长发飘逸，如烟似雾，与金色流光自然衔接并逐渐融合，发丝半透明带渐变光感，姿态柔美，双目微闭，神情宁静，怀抱一束多彩鲜花，花间点缀微光粒子与星点效果，象征人与城市能量的精神连接，人物细节适度简化以突出整体设计感。

光影集中于金色流线、建筑与人物轮廓，形成强烈明暗对比与视觉聚焦，整体氛围宏大、神秘、具有东方神话意境且略带治愈感。色彩以黑与暗红为基底，高亮鎏金为主视觉强调，金色具备丰富明暗层次，辅以小面积高饱和花束色彩点缀，整体高级克制。

页面文字与画面融合排版：顶部居中宋体大字“广州·中国”，下方小字“2026/04/20”，再下方小字“LIYUE”，文字采用淡金色或柔和暖白色，与整体光影统一。高品质细节，电影级光影表现，体积光与粒子细节丰富，画面干净无噪点，超高清8K分辨率，商业级海报质感。

title: 海滩上敬礼的动漫舰娘
author: グリグリ＠ゲーム・艦これ
prompt: An anime-style illustration of {argument name="character identity" default="Tokitsukaze from Kantai Collection"}, a young girl with fluffy short purple hair wearing a small black sailor hat with a gold anchor emblem perched on the side of her head. She has a {argument name="facial expression" default="big bright smile with closed eyes and blushing cheeks"}. She is wearing a white long-sleeved sailor uniform with a blue collar, a yellow neckerchief secured by a dark anchor-shaped clasp, and brown leather straps across her torso. Dark grey ship rigging cannons are visible mounted behind her back. She is {argument name="pose" default="saluting with her right hand"} near her forehead. The scene is set against a {argument name="background" default="sunny beach with blue ocean, white waves, and distant green cliffs under a clear blue sky"}. The lighting is bright and vibrant, highlighting the cheerful atmosphere.

title: Sports Car and Airliner in Hangar
author: nazca alwave
prompt: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car features a black carbon fiber hood, black roof, black alloy wheels, and a front license plate reading "{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}". Directly behind the car, dominating the background, is a {argument name="airplane model" default="white Airbus A320 commercial airliner"} with a blue tail. The hangar has a highly polished, reflective concrete floor that mirrors the car and plane. To the left, a sign on the metal wall reads "{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}". The hangar doors are wide open, revealing a bright, overcast sky and a distant cityscape. The lighting is soft and cinematic, highlighting the sleek aerodynamic curves of both vehicles.

title: 古代学者 AI 安全海报
author: gooby
prompt:
一张精致的棕褐色调插画，风格融合了中国古代学者肖像与现代 AI 品牌元素，呈现于带有明显纹理和水墨质感的陈旧羊皮纸上。画面中央是一位受德谟克利特启发的卷发男性学者半身像，他坐在木桌后，身着层次分明的传统长袍，色调为柔和的蓝灰色与棕色，并带有精致的镶边。他的面部被一块棕色皮肤色调的扁平矩形遮挡，营造出一种匿名或被审查的视觉效果。他右手垂直握着一支毛笔，左手平放在桌面上。在画面中上部偏右处，放置 Claude 标志，包含一个铁锈橙色的太阳光芒徽章，以及深色衬线字体的“Claude”字样。在左上角，添加一个巨大的竖排中文标题“德米斯图”，旁边配有一列较小的竖排中文书法文字：“以语言为媒，理解为舟，助人洞见，推动协作，造福人类，安全可信，通往更美好的未来。”在最左侧添加一行较小的竖排落款“甲辰春写”，下方盖有两枚红色印章。背景展示了一幅中国古典山水画，包含远山、悬崖上的小亭、云雾，右上角和右侧边缘由茂密的竹叶点缀，左下角则有深色的松枝。

木桌占据了画面的下三分之一，桌上摆放着 8 组不同的物品：左侧有一个插着 4 支毛笔的笔筒，一叠 4 本装订成册的书籍，书脊上分别写着“人工智能概论”、“机器学习原理”、“负责任的 AI”和“对齐与价值观”，左中位置有一个砚台或墨碟，中央有一张羊皮纸图表，左下角有一个刻有汉字的小型深色方块印章，右侧有一个带框的告示牌，右下角有一个卷轴，桌面表面呈现出清晰的木纹。中央的羊皮纸图表应显示一个标有“AI 安全 Safety”的圆形节点，连接着周围 6 个分别标有“准确”、“可靠”、“有益”、“透明”、“对齐”和“隐私”的节点，图表周围环绕着精致的云纹。右侧的带框告示牌应以“AI 安全原则”为标题，并列出 4 条中文要点：“减少灾难性风险”、“尊重人类价值观”、“确保系统可控”和“促进长远福祉”。右下角的卷轴应展示“以谨慎之心 创造未来”字样。

采用均衡的构图、学者般沉静的氛围、高度精细的墨线、微妙的水彩渲染、古董博物馆印刷美学，以及由羊皮纸棕褐色、墨棕色、褪色蓝和柔和炭灰色组成的克制色调。整体感觉应是一张融合了东亚古典文人画、哲学肖像画和当代 AI 安全主题的知识性致敬海报。

title: 深色模式 X 推文样机
author: dih
prompt: A dark mode screenshot of an X post. The profile features a man with a mustache in a red shirt and crown, username {argument name="username" default="@iruletheworldmo"} with three strawberry emojis and a blue checkmark. Top right has a "Subscribe" button. The tweet text begins with {argument name="headline" default="🚨 BREAKING FRONTIER MODEL NEWS"} followed by {argument name="subheadline" default="gpt-6 set for release april 14th"} and a short intro about OpenAI leaks. Below are exactly 11 bullet points, each starting with a `>` symbol, detailing {argument name="bullet point topic" default="fictional AI model specs"} such as pretraining dates, outperforming gpt-5.4, native multimodality, killing Sora, renaming to "AGI Deployment", 2 million token context, pricing, safety team changes, a 2025 code red, and a new desktop superapp. The text is white on a black background in a standard sans-serif UI font.

title: 写实海盗 Cosplay 肖像
author: Jack Ma-e/acc
prompt: A highly realistic, professionally retouched photograph of a female cosplayer dressed as {argument name="character" default="Miss Fortune from League of Legends"}. She has a {argument name="facial features" default="French woman's face"} with subtle makeup, green eyes, and long, voluminous wavy {argument name="hair color" default="red"} hair. Her detailed pirate costume features a weathered black tricorn hat with gold filigree, a black leather corset with a deep neckline and gold accents, white ruffled off-the-shoulder sleeves, and a wide brown leather belt. She holds a large, ornate {argument name="prop" default="flintlock pistol"} with brass detailing in her right hand. The background shows the wooden masts and rope rigging of a sailing ship under a bright blue sky. The cinematic, natural lighting highlights the rich textures of leather, metal, and skin, creating a photorealistic editorial portrait.

title: 充满压迫感的发布会梗图
author: Matthew Berman
prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic shot set in the {argument name="location" default="White House press briefing room"}. At the podium sits {argument name="seated character" default="Sam Altman"}, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, looking visibly uncomfortable and nervous, staring blankly ahead. Standing directly behind him is {argument name="standing character" default="Homelander from The Boys"}, wearing his signature blue superhero suit with red gloves and gold eagle shoulder pads. The standing character has one red-gloved hand resting heavily and intimidatingly on the seated character's shoulder, while using his other hand to drink from a {argument name="beverage" default="glass bottle of milk"} with a confident, slightly unhinged smirk. In the background, there is a US flag on the left and a blue oval White House seal on the wall behind them. The podium has a sign reading "THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON".

title: 奇幻沿海城市景观
author: qyou
prompt: A breathtaking, panoramic view of a {argument name="setting" default="fantasy coastal city"}. The scene is dominated by a {argument name="prominent landmark" default="large stone castle on a hill"} overlooking the vibrant blue ocean. Below the castle, a bustling town features {argument name="architecture style" default="European half-timbered houses"} with brown roofs, nestled among lush green trees and palm trees. A clear turquoise inlet flows through the center of the town, lined with stone quays, sandy beaches, and small wooden boats. In the distance, several large sailing ships navigate the deep blue sea. The sky is clear blue with fluffy white clouds on a {argument name="time of day" default="bright sunny day"}. The overall aesthetic is {argument name="art style" default="highly detailed digital illustration, classic RPG concept art"}, with vibrant colors and intricate architectural details.

title: Studio Portrait With Strawberry Ice Cream
author: Arturo Garrido
prompt: A polished studio portrait of a glamorous pop-star-like woman from the chest up, centered against a smooth neutral gray backdrop. She has {argument name="hair color" default="jet black"} long loose wavy hair with a middle part, glossy shine, and soft volume falling over both shoulders. Her face is mostly hidden behind the ice cream cone she is holding up in front of her mouth and lower face, creating a playful fashion-editorial composition. She wears a white ribbed tank top with wide straps and a single visible sparkling stud earring. In her hand is 1 waffle cone topped with 1 large scoop of pink strawberry ice cream with dark red berry swirls and slight melting texture. Warm, flattering beauty lighting, soft shadows, realistic skin tones, high-end celebrity portrait photography, crisp focus on the hand, cone, hair, and shoulders, minimal background, subtly sensual and chic mood, vertical crop.

title: 动漫少女俏皮剪刀手肖像
author: studioあぽろん
prompt: An anime-style illustration of a young girl with {argument name="hair color" default="silver"} hair styled in long twin tails secured with black ribbons, and {argument name="eye color" default="pink"} eyes. She has a {argument name="expression" default="smug smile with a slight blush"} and is looking directly at the viewer. She is posing dynamically, leaning forward slightly with one hand making a peace sign near her cheek and the other hand resting on her hip. She is wearing a white long-sleeved blouse featuring ruffles down the center and at the cuffs, a black ribbon tied at the collar, and a black high-waisted skirt with a ruffled hem and corset-style lacing. The background is a solid {argument name="background color" default="vibrant pink"} with a subtle vignette effect. The art style is high-quality, detailed anime illustration with soft lighting and glossy hair highlights.

title: 运动休闲街拍风格照片
author: Riccardo Wolf
prompt: A photorealistic street style paparazzi shot of a young woman walking through a {argument name="setting" default="sunny parking lot"}. She has {argument name="hair color and style" default="blonde hair in a high ponytail"} and is wearing {argument name="accessory" default="black rectangular sunglasses"}. Her outfit consists of a matching {argument name="activewear color" default="grey"} long-sleeve crop top and high-waisted leggings, paired with chunky white sneakers and white crew socks. Over her left arm, she carries a light blue denim jacket, while holding a {argument name="held item" default="beige insulated water bottle"} and a smartphone in the same hand. The background is blurred with a shallow depth of field, showing the rear of a dark car on the left and out-of-focus buildings and trees in the distance, capturing a casual, candid athleisure aesthetic in bright daylight.

title: 日文 AI Creator Studio 横幅海报
author: やきいも｜週1クリエイトで飯を食う
prompt: 提示词翻译前制作一款精致的日文 AI 创作者社区网站宣传横幅，采用简洁现代的科技广告风格，配色方案为柔和的淡蓝色、薰衣草紫、粉色和白色。采用 16:9 宽屏构图。左侧上方放置一个渐变三角形抽象 Logo 和日文品牌名称 AIクリエイターズ・スタジオ，下方是一条细横分割线，中间带有一个小闪光点。下方是两行超大加粗的日文标题：第一行使用深海军蓝，文字为「AIで、もっと自由に」；第二行使用从青色到紫色再到粉色的渐变大字，文字为「創る・学ぶ・つながる」。标题下方添加一行带有闪光符号的简短日文副标题：「AIを使ったクリエイティブの可能性を広げるメンバーシップコミュニティ」。右半部分制作一个由 6 张圆角矩形视觉卡片组成的拼贴画，展示 AI 生成的创意示例：1 张大型梦幻侧脸女性肖像，周围环绕着花朵和蝴蝶，沐浴在空灵的紫光中；1 张小型赛博朋克城市夜景，画面中有一个孤独的身影；1 张小型毛茸茸猫咪的特写肖像；1 张标有“AI STUDIO”字样的奢华化妆品瓶；1 张小型明亮的海景或花田风景，画面中有一位身穿白衣的女性；以及 1 张大型平板绘图设备放在桌上，配有手写笔、咖啡杯和植物。在右侧叠加一个圆形渐变徽章，上面印有加粗的白色日文文本 一緒に創造の未来をつくろう！。在下方中部横向放置一个半透明白色圆角功能面板，包含 5 个等宽列，配有细分割线和柔和的线条图标。每列包含一个图标、一个加粗的日文标题以及一段较小的两行描述。5 个标题分别为：「限定コンテンツ」、「実践プロンプト＆テンプレート」、「メンバー限定コミュニティ」、「最新情報をいち早くお届け」、「メンバー限定特典」。使用书籍、显示器、聊天气泡、灯泡和礼物的合适图标。在每个标题下方添加简洁的日文描述。最底部添加一个深海军蓝页脚条，上面写有一句醒目的日文行动号召语，采用白色和粉紫色渐变强调文本，AIを味方に、あなたの『創りたい』をカタチに。さあ、一緒に創ろう！。整体外观：高端初创公司落地页风格，光泽柔和，带有细微闪光，采用玻璃拟态面板，排版清晰，日文文本渲染准确，高度易读，视觉平衡，具备专业的社交媒体缩略图品质。

title: 农业科技杂志封面应用截图
author: Darío Ramírez
prompt: 使用提供的移动应用屏幕参考图，将其转换为关于农业创新的高端杂志封面样机。保持手机屏幕上的应用 UI 清晰可辨，并将其置于真实的生活场景中：前景中一名葡萄园工人手持显示该应用的智能手机，背景为葡萄园行、山脉及几名在自然光下工作的工人。将整页设计为一份具有精致农业商业美感的西班牙语杂志封面，采用绿色、奶油色和大地色调。在顶部添加醒目的刊头，文字为“REVISTA CAMPO FUTURO”，上方有一条细长的副标题栏，包含 3 个由竖线分隔的项目：“Especial Viñas de Chile”、“Innovación agrícola”和“Abril 2026”，并在刊头下方添加一行副标题：“Agricultura, innovación y gestión rural”。在左侧添加一个绿色的版块标签“TECNOLOGÍA AGRÍCOLA”，以及粗体的堆叠式主封面标题：“La app con IA que está revolucionando el campo”，随后附上一段关于 Kimün 如何取代传统笔记本并为葡萄园及农业企业提供实时管理的简短介绍。添加一个圆形的标注徽章，提及关于 Kimün 作为智能 AI 田间笔记本的专题报道。包含 2 张底部的预告图片：一张是工人手持手机在葡萄园中的特写，标注“p.18”及关于田间诊断和手机警报的说明；另一张是 3 人共同查看应用的小型场景，标注“p.24”及关于互联田间团队、语音、记录和即时成本的说明。在右侧栏中，添加 3 个带有图标和页码的专题预告：一篇关于告别纸质化、开启智能田间笔记本新时代（p.30），一篇关于通过数据驱动决策实现更高效的葡萄园管理（p.36），以及一篇关于水资源管理 4.0 和更智能、更具盈利能力的灌溉（p.42）。添加一个包含 5 个类别标签的页脚条：“AGRICULTURA”、“FRUTALES”、“VIÑAS”、“GANADERÍA”、“SUSTENTABILIDAD”，并附上条形码和价格。使其看起来像是一张精美的杂志封面摄影作品和编辑排版，而非平面的应用截图。

title: 赛博朋克动漫风格角色：霓虹浴缸
author: Binary Rot
prompt: A highly detailed anime-style digital illustration of a cyberpunk female character relaxing in a circular metallic tub filled with swirling, luminous blue water that sparkles with digital neon particles. She has spiky {argument name="hair color" default="blue and purple"} hair, {argument name="eye color" default="glowing blue"} eyes, and intricate cybernetic implants with glowing cables and neon nodes attached to her neck and the side of her head. A subtle grid pattern is visible on her cheek. She is looking over her shoulder while {argument name="activity" default="smoking a cigarette"}, with a thin, glowing trail of smoke rising into the air. The background features a dark, high-tech wall illuminated by glowing {argument name="background color scheme" default="blue and purple"} circuit board patterns, emphasizing a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic with intense neon lighting.

title: 复古商店购物场景
author: のるま
prompt: A photorealistic, candid shot of two young Asian women shopping inside a tightly packed {argument name="setting" default="vintage clothing store"}. The woman in the foreground has brown hair in a ponytail and is wearing a {argument name="foreground outfit" default="white ribbed crop top and distressed denim shorts"} with a beige shoulder bag. She is holding up and examining a {argument name="item being examined" default="blue satin souvenir jacket with intricate embroidery"}. Beside her, the second woman has dark hair with bangs, wears {argument name="background outfit" default="a white t-shirt and denim overalls"}, and is smiling warmly at the jacket. The store is filled with dense racks of colorful vintage clothes under warm, atmospheric lighting, with a wooden sign reading "VINTAGE" visible in the background. Shallow depth of field focuses on the women and the jacket.

title: 太空电梯里的动漫少女
author: らけしで / Mizmic Studio
prompt: A high-angle, anime-style illustration of a girl with {argument name="hair color" default="long dark hair with purple tips"} standing inside a futuristic glass elevator, looking up at a massive space elevator structure. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="sailor uniform with a pleated skirt and thigh-high socks"}. The elevator cab has metallic railings, glowing cyan accents, and a digital display showing an upward arrow and the text "{argument name="altitude text" default="005829 km"}". Through the large glass ceiling and windows, a colossal, intricately detailed space station with a central pillar and a large ring structure is visible against a backdrop of a starry sky and the curvature of {argument name="planet" default="Earth"} with clouds below. The lighting is dramatic, emphasizing the vast scale of the space structure and the atmospheric perspective.

title: 科幻 Q 版机器人太空焊接场景
author: らけしで / Mizmic Studio
prompt: A highly detailed sci-fi illustration of a {argument name="robot style" default="cute chibi robot"} floating in space, {argument name="action" default="welding a massive metallic megastructure"}. The robot has a large round head with {argument name="eye color" default="glowing blue"} eyes and a white and black mechanical body. It is holding a tool that emits bright orange sparks against the framework. The megastructure is enormous, curving through the scene, built as a {argument name="structure type" default="dark metal lattice covered in thousands of tiny glowing yellow lights"}. In the background, a {argument name="star color" default="brilliant glowing blue"} star shines brightly against a deep space backdrop filled with stars and cosmic dust. The image features hyper-detailed textures, cinematic lighting, high contrast, and a dense, intricate mechanical design.

title: 温馨酒馆里的老年夫妇
author: Aidan
prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a smiling older Caucasian couple sitting at a rustic wooden table inside a {argument name="setting" default="cozy traditional pub"}. The man on the left has white hair and a full white beard, wearing a {argument name="man's clothing" default="green fleece jacket"} over a maroon shirt. The woman on the right has short grey hair and glasses, wearing a {argument name="woman's clothing" default="blue denim jacket and cream scarf"}. They are looking directly at the camera, each holding one of the 2 {argument name="beverage" default="glasses of beer"}. On the table in the foreground, there is 1 small lit brass lantern and 1 {argument name="table snacks" default="bowl of potato chips"}. The background features warm lighting, wooden paneled walls with framed pictures, windows on the left, and blurred patrons, creating a shallow depth of field.

title: 阿尔卑斯草甸中的写实风动漫猫娘
author: とらの
prompt: A cute anthropomorphic cat-girl with white fur, {argument name="hair color" default="short green hair"}, a prominent ahoge, and large {argument name="eye color" default="green"} anime eyes. She has fluffy green cat ears and a long white tail. She is wearing a loose, oversized {argument name="outfit" default="green off-the-shoulder tunic"} and sitting peacefully on the ground with her legs tucked to the side and paws resting gently in front of her. The setting is a lush {argument name="setting" default="alpine meadow filled with small white and yellow wildflowers"}. In the background, there is a sweeping valley, pine forests, and majestic snow-capped mountains under a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. The art style blends an anime character design with a highly realistic, {argument name="style" default="photographic landscape"} featuring bright, natural sunlight.

title: 百叶窗光影下的电影感肖像
author: 栗
prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting on a dark chair. She has shoulder-length bob hair with straight bangs colored {argument name="hair color" default="teal"}. She is wearing a {argument name="top clothing" default="navy blue tank top"} and {argument name="bottom clothing" default="light beige linen shorts"}. She is leaning slightly forward with her hands resting near her knees, looking directly at the camera with a {argument name="expression" default="neutral, calm"} expression. The scene features {argument name="lighting style" default="dramatic shadows from venetian blinds"}, casting distinct horizontal stripes of warm, golden light across her face, body, and the plain warm-toned wall behind her. A window with closed blinds is visible on the right side of the frame. High contrast, moody atmosphere, highly detailed.

title: 城市街头涂鸦人像
author: 古一
prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a young East Asian woman with short, choppy {argument name="hair color" default="light purple"} hair. She is leaning against a dark wall covered in vibrant neon graffiti, including the text "{argument name="graffiti text" default="VSC"}" and a smiley face. She is {argument name="pose" default="making a heart shape with her hands"} over her chest. She is wearing a {argument name="top clothing" default="white buttoned crop top under an oversized, unbuttoned light blue striped shirt"} that is falling off her shoulders, paired with {argument name="bottom clothing" default="distressed black denim shorts"}, white socks, and white sneakers. She has one knee slightly bent and lifted. The lighting is soft, hazy, and dreamy with cool tones, and the camera angle is slightly tilted, creating a stylish, urban streetwear aesthetic.

title: 上帝视角下的仙侠城市景观
author: 古一
prompt: An extreme top-down god's-eye perspective looking directly down at a vast, glowing {argument name="city style" default="ancient Chinese city"} extending to the horizon, where the curvature of the planet is visible. In the foreground, a lone {argument name="character type" default="swordsman"} in traditional robes stands on the edge of an ornate, dark-tiled ancient palace roof, looking down. Below lies an endless sea of ancient architecture illuminated by warm glowing lights, bustling streets, and dense crowds. Soft mist and fog layers drift through the sprawling metropolis. Photorealistic fantasy concept art, Chinese Xianxia aesthetics, extreme wide angle, massive depth of field. Grand, lonely, and poetic atmosphere with strong color contrast and a moody {argument name="color palette" default="dark blue and warm gold"} color palette.

title: 风洞空气动力学测试
author: そら
prompt: A photorealistic image of a black Formula 3 race car undergoing an aerodynamic wind tunnel test. Thick white smoke trails flow from a front nozzle over the car's nose, halo, and rear wing. The car features the number 1 and 'F3 FIA FORMULA 3 CHAMPIONSHIP' decals, with a helmeted driver seated inside. The setting is a dark industrial facility with a metallic grid floor. On the left wall, a dark sign displays the text {argument name="wall sign text" default="流体可視化実験 (煙による流れの観察) 車両周りの空気の流れを煙を用いて可視化しています。"} alongside 'F3 WIND TUNNEL TEST'. In the bottom right foreground, a black box labeled {argument name="box label" default="スモークジェネレータ"} sits next to a computer monitor showing a live feed of the car and the telemetry text {argument name="monitor text" default="風速: 50 m/s ヨー角: 0 deg 煙: ON"}. Dramatic, realistic engineering photography.

title: 108 款 Q 版奇幻曼陀罗
author: ⚙gear machine@AI
prompt:
一张宏大且细节极其丰富的奇幻曼陀罗海报，展示了 108 个独特的 Q 版角色，它们围绕着一个闪耀的中心徽章，以同心圆环的形式排列。整体构图完全对称，填满宽阔的横向画布，宛如一幅华丽的收藏级壁画。中心位置设有一个发光的金色核心，9 个 Q 版动物奇幻吉祥物聚集成一个圆形奖章，每个角色都拥有超大头部、娇小身体、富有表现力的眼睛和奢华的服饰细节。中心周围环绕着多个间距均匀的同心圆，容纳其余 99 个角色，每个角色占据一个楔形区域，并被设计为独特的元素或神话变体。其中包括狐狸、兔子、猫、狼、狮子、鸟、龙、鹿以及混合兽类角色，所有角色均以可爱的 Q 版风格呈现，但配有史诗般的高奇幻盔甲、长袍、皇冠、羽毛、角、宝石、披风、法杖和魔法配饰。通过颜色、轮廓、物种特征和元素主题，使每个角色在视觉上都各具特色，同时保持统一的绘画感动漫奇幻美学。

使用以明亮的金色、象牙白、奶油色、紫色、靛蓝、蓝宝石色和柔和琥珀色为主的丰富色调，并点缀以深红、冰青、祖母绿和日落橙。赋予图像一种神圣天体图或黄道十二宫轮的感觉，每个圆环之间由优雅的镀金边框和弧形分隔线隔开。在许多角色周围添加发光的魔法能量、闪光、光环、旋转的火焰、薄雾、雪花、云朵、水花、闪电卷、花卉图案和天体粒子。在外围，放置几个整合在边框中的大型装饰性守护者插画：左上角是一个明亮的太阳徽章，右上角的圆形面板中是一只白凤凰般的鸟，右下角是一个花卉或星爆徽章，左下角的圆形面板中是一组火系角色集群，左右边缘还嵌入了额外的巨型元素兽形象。用受泥金装饰手抄本和奇幻塔罗牌设计启发的精致古董装饰边框框住整幅艺术品，运用金银丝细工、角落徽章、几何饰边和奥术图案。

渲染效果应极其致密且清晰，如同用于海报打印的 4K 奇幻插画，整幅图像中包含清晰可辨的微小角色轮廓、错综复杂的线条、柔和的水彩质感阴影、发光的高光以及精致的集换式卡牌游戏概念艺术质感。强调丰富性、和谐感和径向秩序：总计 108 个 Q 版形象，排列成一个宏伟的神话元素吉祥物曼陀罗。

title: Move Display Stand Onto Deck
author: 肖师傅
prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the same garden, pond, trees, hillside, and wooden deck viewpoint, but reposition the decorative sign installation so it stands on the wooden deck in the foreground instead of in the water. Enlarge it and center it more prominently in front of the camera while preserving a believable outdoor perspective, natural daylight, and consistent shadows. Keep the installation structure as a 3-column by 3-row set of 9 circular sign panels on slim green stands with the top header sign reading “对着镜子笑一场”. Make the panels look more reflective and mirror-like, showing realistic reflections of the surrounding greenery, while retaining the cute face graphics and Chinese text on the circles. The result should look like a realistic ad mockup/composite photo of the same display placed correctly in the scene.

title: 90 年代科幻电影悬崖惊险剧照
author: dd dd
prompt: A cinematic still from a {argument name="movie era and genre" default="1990s American sci-fi action movie"}. A {argument name="male character description" default="rugged male protagonist with a dirty face and a distressed brown leather jacket"} is {argument name="action" default="desperately dangling from the edge of a rocky cliff"}, gripping the rough stone with both hands. Above him, a {argument name="female character description" default="female-presenting android with pale skin, a sharp black bob haircut, and visible robotic joints on her arms"} is calmly looking down at him, resting her hands on the cliff edge. The background features a {argument name="setting" default="vast, deep canyon with a river winding through it under an overcast, dramatic sky"}. Shot on 35mm film, realistic textures, dramatic cinematic lighting.

title: 日式奇幻带翼猪电影海报
author: ぜーにゃさん
prompt: 一张极具戏剧性的日式奇幻电影海报，采用绘画风格、超精细的电影插画质感。海报采用垂直构图，如同剧场版主视觉海报，底部印有暖金色标题，并将多个情感片段层叠组合成一个统一的场景。中心角色是一只毛茸茸的小猪，有着柔软的奶油色皮毛、超大的粉色内耳、小巧的鼻子、卷曲的尾巴，以及闪烁着金光的巨大天使羽翼。它直立站在屋顶或高处的木质平台上，俯瞰着日落时分广阔的东京城市景观，一只蹄子拿着威士忌酒杯，另一只蹄子叉在腰间，姿态如同一个疲惫但坚韧的中年上班族。远处是东京天际线、水域、桥梁、漂浮的灯笼，以及在金、桃、紫、深蓝云层映衬下发出橙红色光芒的东京塔。中心周围有 4 个辅助小场景：1) 左上角，带翼猪独自坐在夜晚怀旧的灯笼日式小巷的狭窄吧台前，神情疲惫而忧郁，旁边放着酒瓶和酒杯；2) 顶部中央，带翼猪在类似居酒屋的夜生活场景中与 2 名成年人类一起喝酒，周围环绕着温暖的灯光；3) 右上方，带翼猪提着小手提箱，背对着镜头沿着铁轨走向灿烂的海上日落；4) 左中部，带翼猪独自走在雨后霓虹闪烁的城市街道上，背影被周围发光的招牌和倒影环绕。整幅画面应营造出苦乐参半、充满魔力、孤独且充满希望的氛围，如同关于成年、孤独与情感生存的精品动画电影海报。运用丰富的灯光、密集的环境细节、闪烁的倒影、发光的灯笼、电影般的氛围以及浓郁的蓝橙色对比。画面中需融入日式海报排版：最上方为标语“ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。”；标题上方为“独身オヤジ、最後の青春。”；底部中央为巨大的主标题“翼のオヤジ”，采用粗体毛笔书法字体；下方为标语“笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。”；右下角有一个圆形徽章，写着“秋公開”和“今”；底部边缘添加日式电影海报风格的小字演职员表。街道场景中包含 2 个可见的垂直灯笼/店铺招牌，上面写着“居酒屋”，以及 1 个写着“黒豚”的酒瓶标签。高细节，情感丰富的奇幻海报，高级动画电影美学，日式都市怀旧与魔幻现实主义的结合。

title: 动力装甲镜中自拍
author: Vic Rom
prompt: A person wearing a highly detailed, weathered, and battle-damaged {argument name="armor type" default="T-60 power armor from Fallout"} taking a mirror selfie with a {argument name="phone type" default="black smartphone"}. The armor is bulky, metallic, and covered in grime, rust, and scratches, featuring a distinctive helmet with a respirator, headlamp, and thick shoulder pauldrons. The person is holding the phone in their right armored hand, positioned in front of their chest. The reflection is seen in a slightly dirty mirror with a dark wooden frame. In the background, there is a dimly lit, messy room with a {argument name="poster subject" default="Vault Boy poster"} partially visible on the wall behind the armor. The lighting is moody and realistic, emphasizing the textures of the metal and the gritty atmosphere.

title: 四联木刻版画风格肖像壁纸
author: M
prompt: A desktop wallpaper featuring a horizontal four-panel split layout with thick black borders. It showcases half-body portraits in a high-contrast {argument name="art style" default="woodcut printmaking"} style with thick black lines and cross-hatching, conveying a confident and elite mood. From left to right: {argument name="subject 1" default="Jack Ma"} against a textured orange background; {argument name="subject 2" default="Elon Musk"} in a suit against a textured red background; {argument name="subject 3" default="Mark Zuckerberg"} in a black shirt against a textured blue background; and {argument name="subject 4" default="Pony Ma"} wearing glasses and a suit against a textured green background. The subjects are rendered in monochromatic beige tones, contrasting sharply with the vibrant background of each pane.

title: 全息假面骑士 SSR 卡牌
author: NickZag
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张超精细的高级全息集换式卡牌插图，主角为 假面骑士 1 号，设计风格参考超稀有特摄收藏卡，带有垂直全画幅华丽边框。中心人物是一位经典的蒙面英雄，采用动态向前伸展的姿势，占据了构图的大部分（大腿以上），一只戴手套的手伸向观众，另一只手拿着一张同款的小型卡牌。他身穿深绿色装甲胸甲、黑色紧身衣，佩戴银色分段式手套和前臂护甲，一条红色围巾向右侧戏剧性地飘动，腰间系着红色腰带，带有巨大的圆形红色带扣，头戴金属质感的昆虫状头盔，配有 2 根长银色触角和 2 只超大的多面深红色复眼。背景是混乱的末日城市夜战场景，包含废墟建筑、烟雾、火花、流光溢彩的爆炸以及繁星点点的宇宙天空。背景和角落处需包含 10 个较小的骑士形象：右上角天空中有 2 个飞行形象，左中废墟上有 1 个攀爬或跳跃形象，中右侧有 3 个背景战斗形象，右下角有 2 个小型形象，左下角有 1 个带有蓝色装饰的形象，最左侧边缘有 1 个部分可见的形象。艺术风格粗犷、具有油画质感、金属感且充满电影感，整张图像覆盖着密集的闪光颗粒、彩虹箔反射、金色花丝线条以及棱镜般的全息高光。卡牌边框应采用奢华的黑色、金色和虹彩箔片，并具备集换式卡牌游戏的风格。顶部中心放置文本“MASKED RIDER”，下方为大型衬线字体“KAMEN RIDER”以及巨大的金色数字“1”。左上角放置一个显示蒙面骑士面部的圆形徽章。右上角放置一个大徽章，写有“SSR”及其下方的 5 颗金星。左下角放置一个面板，写有“CARD TYPE”和“CHARACTER”。底部中心放置文本“KAMEN RIDER 1”及其下方的“仮面ライダー1号”，以及一条类似条形码的带状区域，写有“RIDER LEGEND 1971”。右下角添加一个巨大的金色草书签名“NickZag”。使整张卡牌呈现出超高级珍稀卡的感觉，具备戏剧性的透视效果、极致的细节、强烈的对比度、发光的余烬、破碎城市的能量感以及奢华的全息箔片质感。

title: 电影感夜间女性肖像摄影
author: Out Of Context Girls
prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a young Asian woman with a {argument name="hair style and color" default="short black bob haircut and bangs"}, seen in profile. She is {argument name="action" default="smoking a cigarette"}, holding it to her lips with her right hand, with a thin trail of blue smoke rising. She is {argument name="setting" default="leaning against a metal balcony railing at night"}. The image features a {argument name="aesthetic" default="cinematic, moody atmosphere with noticeable film grain and a direct flash photography aesthetic"}.

title: ChatGPT 应用展示微信朋友圈截图
author: CY.Sean
prompt: 一张逼真的 ChatGPT 移动端应用深色模式手机截图，在黑色背景下全屏显示，带有 iPhone 风格的状态栏。顶部状态栏左侧显示时间 20:57，右侧显示小型蜂窝信号、Wi-Fi 和电量图标，电量显示为 61%。下方是 ChatGPT 对话标题栏，包含左侧菜单图标、标题“ChatGPT”、编辑图标以及三点菜单图标。在聊天区域，显示 1 条用户气泡消息，内容为“生成一张微信朋友圈截图，随机生成用户名和分享内容”，以右对齐的深灰色圆角气泡显示。下方显示助手回复区域，文字为“图片已创建”。在该回复下方，显示 1 张生成的图像预览：一张白色手机屏幕上的微信朋友圈页面长条圆角截图。在生成的图像内部，顶部栏显示时间 20:42 和标题“朋友圈”。展示 2 条独立的朋友圈动态。第一条动态包含女性头像和用户名“星星都不醒”，后跟一段关于生活和周末的简短中文文案，接着是一个 3x3 的拼图，包含 9 张正方形图片：水面落日、花朵、精致餐点、林荫大道、白色毛绒小狗、暖光灯、绿色水果或甜点、粉色云朵或天空，以及一张剪影照片。下方包含时间戳“2小时前”、一行 3 个点赞用户名，以及一个包含 3 条简短中文评论的评论区。第二条动态包含男性头像和用户名“山川与海”，后跟一段健身主题的简短中文文案，带有绿色对勾表情和肱二头肌表情，接着是 1 张健身房镜面自拍，下方显示时间戳“3小时前”及一行点赞。在生成的图像预览之外、ChatGPT 应用截图之内，在图片下方显示一行 4 个操作图标：点赞、点踩、分享/导出和更多。在屏幕底部，包含深色模式的 ChatGPT 输入栏，左侧有一个圆形加号按钮，占位符文字为“询问 ChatGPT”，右侧有一个麦克风图标和一个圆形语音按钮。使用真实的移动端 UI 比例、清晰的排版、逼真的中文应用界面细节以及照片级渲染，使其看起来像是 ChatGPT 应用展示 AI 生成微信朋友圈截图的真实截屏。

title: 玄武门之变朋友圈动态
author: 支旁
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张幽默且细节丰富的合成图像，画面左侧是一部显示玄武门之变朋友圈动态的现代智能手机，右侧则是动态中发布的战场图像，延伸为宏大的电影级历史场景。手机应为黑色 iPhone，边框极窄，带有顶部刘海，正面朝向。手机屏幕上，应用标题栏为深灰黑色，显示白色文字“朋友圈”，左侧有返回箭头，右侧有相机图标。下方是来自 唐王世民 的社交动态，配有一个身着盔甲、头戴战盔的中国古代武士方形头像。名字下方有定位图标和文字“长安·玄武门”，以及时间戳“唐武德九年六月初四 巳时”。朋友圈正文内容为：“吾为国家除逆贼，请社稷。今日玄武门，功在千秋！⚔️💪”。正文下方是与右侧大场景相呼应的方形战场图片预览。图片下方是元数据行，精确显示三项内容：“3.8万次浏览”、“赞 (666)”以及评论图标旁的“(128)”。下方评论区可见 5 条评论，每条评论配有微型头像，文字风格模仿历史人物的社交媒体回复。评论者应包含以下中文名称：“尉迟恭”、“房玄龄”、“李渊”、“杜如晦”和“长孙无忌”，语气需赞美行动的成功；其中一条评论应暗示皇帝震惊且国家局势已定。右侧是 玄武门 外日落时分的唐代史诗战场画作，背景是一座巨大的灰色石质城楼，门匾上书“玄武门”。画面中央前景处，一名头戴红缨盔的骑马甲胄弓箭手正在拉弓，胯下骑着一匹棕马；周围有 7 名清晰可见的骑马或站立的唐军甲士，地上还有 1 名倒地并向上指点的甲士。多面印有黑色大字“唐”的黄色战旗在尘土中飘扬，至少可见 4 面旗帜。天空中箭矢飞掠，战马嘶鸣腾跃，空气中弥漫着尘土、温暖的夕阳余晖和战场动感。视觉风格为写实历史史诗艺术，带有绘画质感，但整体概念具有喜剧性和时代错位感，将古代政变呈现为社交媒体朋友圈动态。所有可见的界面文字均需使用中文，保持合理的移动端 UI 间距，并将手机模型与扩展的战场艺术作品融为一体，呈现为宽屏构图。

title: 星空奇幻动漫电影海报
author: ツバサ天九
prompt:
提示词翻译前一张极具戏剧张力的日式奇幻动漫电影海报，采用竖版单张构图。画面中心是一位美丽的少女，留着极长的银白色飘逸长发，拥有闪烁的金色双眸和冷静而迷人的微笑，正向观众伸出一只手。她身着黑白配色的星空礼服，配有合身的束腰胸衣、白色胸前饰板、前襟黑色丝带系带、带有柔和白色荷叶边的黑色分体式袖子、腰间黑色腰带，多层裙摆上装饰着 3 个金色的新月装饰，脖子上戴着带有金色新月吊坠的黑色颈圈。她的刘海附近还别着 1 个金色新月发夹。背景是璀璨的夜空，繁星点点，伴有星云状云团，头顶上方悬挂着巨大的月食光环，左侧发丝周围环绕着 3 个漂浮的新月光环特效。背景展现了一座华丽的奇幻城市，拥有高耸的哥特式宫殿建筑、尖塔、类似天文台的结构以及闪烁的窗户，一切都沐浴在清冷的月光下。整体采用深靛蓝、紫罗兰、午夜蓝、银色和金色的丰富色调，点缀着闪光、魔法粒子、轮廓光和光泽高光，呈现出一种质感浓郁、现代动漫风格的绘画海报效果。

将其设计为一张排版完整的日式电影海报，使用优雅的金色和白色衬线字体。在顶部居中位置放置日文标题：夜が欠けるたび、忘れていた真実が目を覚ます。。在右侧，竖排设置一行金色的日文大标语：最後の月光が消える前に、世界の記憶をつなぎ直せ。。在左侧，排列 4 块堆叠的日文正文，中间用装饰性分割线和新月图案隔开。在右下角添加一个圆形的金色宣传徽章，内含日文宣传文字。在画面中下部，放置巨大的发光日文片名，采用华丽的金色与白色字体：月蝕のリグレット。在片名下方添加一行居中的日文副标题。下方放置一条水平特征线，包含 3 个由金色符号分隔的日文短语：“记忆”、“月光”、“观测魔法”。在最底部，左右中各放置一行简短的日文预告文案，并在其下方居中位置放置一行巨大的发光上映日期：近日公開。整体氛围史诗、忧郁、魔幻、空灵且怀旧，呈现出高预算奇幻动漫电影海报的质感。

title: 《Dark Space Emperor》电影海报
author: ZeFred.AI
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张黑暗史诗科幻电影海报，适用于 EMPIRE OF THE VOID，采用极具电影感的写实太空歌剧风格。构图居中，一位高大的外星皇帝站在巨大的圆形指挥台后，采用低角度仰拍视角，使人物显得威严且如神明般不可侵犯。皇帝身着华丽的黑色与枪灰色生物机械盔甲，配有锋利的层叠肩甲、雕刻精美的金属丝饰、长长的深色斗篷以及高贵的长形头盔冠冕。面部大部分隐藏在阴影中，营造出神秘而令人生畏的气场。一只巨大的利爪手部显眼地放在前景中发光的桌面上。指挥台显示着蓝紫色调的发光螺旋星系全息图，带有同心圆界面环和微妙的宇宙光芒。场景设定在一艘巨型星舰的舰桥或王座室中，两扇弧形全景窗框住了外太空。窗外总共可见 8 艘宇宙飞船：左侧 4 艘，右侧 4 艘，包括几艘大型战舰和较小的护航舰。一颗巨大的行星占据了左侧背景的大部分，而右侧背景则展示了紫蓝色的星云和星场。两名次要的外星军官坐在中景背景中，左侧 1 名，右侧 1 名，每人都在发光的未来派控制台前。色调为深黑、钢灰、靛蓝、紫罗兰和冷蓝色，带有戏剧性的轮廓光、光泽的金属反射和浓郁的氛围阴影。布局应呈现出高端大片海报的质感：顶部居中处为小号大写字母组成的标语 INTELLIGENCE. DOMINION. DESTINY. THE GALAXY BOWS TO NONE.，底部附近为优雅且字间距宽阔的衬线大写字母标题，第一行是 EMPIRE，下方是 OF THE VOID，其中字母 O 设计为发光的黑洞日食样式。在此下方，添加一个发光的帝国三叉戟式徽章，居中放置在发行日期文本 COMING SOON 上方。最底部包含一条由微小电影海报排版风格组成的密集制作人员名单。超精细、对称、险恶、帝国风、银河征服氛围、垂直单张海报、高级 VFX 关键视觉图、清晰对焦、高对比度、戏剧性科幻灯光。

title: 复仇动作电影海报
author: nazca alwave
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张高对比度、电影质感的复仇惊悚片竖版海报，标题为 DEADLINE VENGEANCE。构图主体是一位身处前景的硬汉，中年男性，短黑发，留着粗犷的胡茬，身穿黑色皮夹克或战术夹克。他从画面左侧直接向观众瞄准一把半自动手枪，通过强烈的透视效果使枪支看起来巨大且靠近镜头。他的面部部分隐藏在阴影中，营造出神秘而危险的氛围。背景是夜间黑暗的现代城市天际线，上方笼罩着风暴云，右上角天空有 1 架直升机，右侧建筑物附近有 1 团巨大的火球爆炸，烟雾、火花和碎片四散。海报最上方，有一行红色小号大写文字：REVENGE IS HIS MISSION。在左中区域，添加 4 行堆叠的白色大写标语：THE PAST TOOK EVERYTHING. HE'LL TAKE EVERYTHING BACK.，样式为由细红线分隔的 2 个短块。主标题横跨中下部，分为 2 个单词：第一个单词采用巨大的做旧金属白色块状字体，第二个单词采用稍小一些的粗体红色大写字母。在海报下三分之一处，展示 1 个孤独的男性背影，他站在湿漉漉的反光街道中央，手持手枪，面对着燃烧的城市。他周围共有 4 辆警车，左右各 2 辆，闪烁着警灯；远方地平线附近还有 2 架直升机，使整张海报中共有 3 架直升机。下方的两个角落点缀着火焰、残骸、烟雾、余烬以及远处几个武装人员的剪影。底部中央添加红色的发行文字 COMING SOON，下方配有较小的白色文字 EXPERIENCE IT IN IMAX。最底部添加一行密集的虚构制作人员名单和电影分级框。配色方案：黑色、炭灰色、钢灰色、橙色火焰和深红色。风格：精致的好莱坞大片主视觉，戏剧性的轮廓光，照片级真实感，超高细节，强烈的对比度，变形宽银幕动作照明，烟雾缭绕的氛围，爆炸性的城市混乱，高级院线海报设计。

title: 多角度工作室角色设定图

Transform the black-and-white reference into full color, applying natural skin tones and black hair. Remove the original environment and place the subject against a {argument name="background color" default="plain grey"} background with {argument name="lighting style" default="clean, neutral studio lighting"}. The generated grid must show the exact same character, wearing the preserved white lace camisole and heart necklace, in {argument name="number of panels" default="4"} distinct poses: 1) straight-on front view, 2) right profile view, 3) left 3/4 view looking over the shoulder, and 4) right 3/4 view looking slightly down.

title: # 混沌としたメモ書き・記号の集合体からキャラクターの顔を浮かび上がらせるアート
author: loglogrog
prompt:
# 混沌としたメモ書き・記号の集合体からキャラクターの顔を浮かび上がらせるアート

--- スタイル
- 白い紙の上に黒インクで描かれた大量の手書きメモ、数式、記号、ランダムな線。
- 紙いっぱいに散らばる書き殴り風のカオス。
- 所々に赤インクの強調（ライン、塗り潰し、マーカー風の塊）。
- アナログのノート落書きのような質感。

--- 構図
- ランダムなメモや記号が全体を覆い尽くす。
- 黒インクの線や文字の密度が「キャラクターの顔」の位置に集中する。
- 結果として、混沌の中から「与えられたキャラクターの顔のシルエット・表情」がうっすら浮かび上がる。
- 顔は写実的ではなく、カオスの断片が集まって形を成す。

--- 色彩
- モノクロ（黒・白）を主体に構成。
- 赤インクをアクセントとして散発的に配置。
- 彩度は抑えめ、アナログの紙とインク感を重視。

--- 表現要素
- 読めるようで読めない文字列、日本語や英数字が混在。
- 数式記号、矢印、点、斜線、クロス、ドリップ（インクの飛び散り）。
- キャラクターの顔の目や髪の輪郭は、メモや記号の配置の「余白」や「濃淡」で浮かび上がる。

--- 禁止事項
- 顔を直接的に描き込む写実ポートレート。
- デジタル処理的で整然とした幾何学模様。
- カラフルな彩色や過飽和表現。
- ロゴ、透かし、人工的なCG感。

--- Definition of Done (DoD)
- 全体は「混沌としたメモ・記号の集合体」として成立している。  
- 与えられたキャラクターの顔が、混沌の濃淡・配置から自然に浮かび上がる。  
- 色はモノクロ＋赤アクセントのみ。  
- 紙とインクの手描き的質感を保持している。

title: Studio Product Render From Blueprint
author: amy
prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn the technical engineering spec sheet into a clean studio product hero render of the same jellyfish-shaped kitchen utensil holder. Keep the overall product design, translucent blue dome cap, silver base, and the same 4 hanging utensils: 1 slotted spatula, 1 pasta server, and 2 spoons. Remove all blueprint elements, including the exploded view, dimension lines, labels, tables, notes, and title block. Show only the assembled product centered in frame, front-facing, isolated against a minimal light gray background with a white surface, soft diffused lighting, subtle realistic shadows, and glossy premium materials. Make it look like a contemporary industrial design catalog or e-commerce product photograph.

title: 体育联赛邀请函海报提示词
author: 李岳
prompt:
{argument name="活动名称" default="广东省城市足球超级联赛（粤超）"}邀请函海报设计，比例{argument name="比例" default="9:16"}； 

S型流动构图，画面从下方向上延展，一条由足球运动轨迹形成的动态能量流贯穿画面， 中心为一颗发光的足球，带有动感轨迹与能量光效；

沿S型动线融合广东城市地标与文化元素： 广州塔、深圳平安金融中心、珠海渔女雕像、岭南建筑与佛山武术剪影、中山孙中山文化象征、潮汕英歌舞动态人物轮廓、清远山水自然景观， 所有元素采用“线描 + 局部色块 + 留白”融合表现，层次递进、远近虚实结合；

加入抽象足球运动员剪影，弱化人物细节，强化动势与竞技氛围，视觉重点仍为足球；

风格：现代国潮高级海报，极简风格但富有设计感，高级、干净、统一， 融合东方美学与现代体育视觉；

色彩方案：高饱和但克制，中国红为主视觉，青蓝色辅助，金色点缀高光， 高对比但不杂乱，具有品牌级视觉冲击力； 

顶部中央横版视觉主标题 「{argument name="主标题" default="广东省城市足球超级联赛"}」：中字，宋体， 中央竖排文字排版： 「粤超」，大字，手写书法艺术字体， 「邀请函」：中字，宋体，纵向排列，间距较大， 底部中央第一排横排： 「{argument name="日期" default="2026年4月25日"}」，小字，宋体，第二排：「广州越秀山体育场」，小字，宋体， 预留文字排版空间；

整体版式平衡、具有高级品牌海报质感，极致精细，构图简洁干净，无杂乱元素，电影级光影，8K 分辨率，高端设计感。融入源自中国传统祥云纹的雅致云纹与水波纹元素，浮动光效粒子，富有动感与生机。

title: 健身 SaaS 着陆页 UI
author: Stephen Day | Google AI, Agents & Vibe Coding
prompt:
提示词翻译前设计一个现代、高端的 健身应用 着陆页及产品 UI，品牌名称为 PulseFit。

创建一个简洁的 Web 设计模型，使其看起来像一个真实的 SaaS 健身平台及配套移动端应用。设计风格应体现高端感、激励性且易于使用，UI/UX 风格需对标顶级健康与健身应用。

包含内容：
- 首屏板块：包含醒目的标题、简短的副标题、强有力的行动号召（CTA）按钮以及应用预览
- 仪表盘 UI：展示每日活动、消耗卡路里、锻炼连续天数、心率、步数及进度环
- 锻炼计划卡片：涵盖力量、有氧、灵活性及恢复训练
- 营养追踪板块：包含宏量营养素分析及饮水量记录
- 进度图表与分析组件
- 教练/社区板块：包含个人资料卡片及用户评价
- 定价板块及应用商店下载引导
- 移动端应用界面：与 Web 设计并列展示，呈现统一的产品生态系统

风格导向：
- 时髦、极简、现代的界面
- 高端健身品牌美学
- 舒适的间距、清晰的层级、圆角卡片、柔和阴影
- 深色模式 UI，搭配电光蓝、霓虹绿或活力橙等充满能量的强调色
- 清晰的排版、真实的图表、精致的按钮、美观的引导页体验
- 高度细节化、符合 Dribbble 标准、具备初创公司水准的产品设计
- 真实的 UX 案例研究展示，非卡通或插画风格

构图：
- 完整的网站首页模型
- 在一个精致的展示中呈现多个 UI 板块
- 采用微透视或正视的产品展示视角
- 简洁的背景，带有微妙的渐变与专业灯光效果
- 超高细节、清晰的文字渲染、视觉平衡的布局

输出：
一个令人惊艳、逼真的健身应用网站及仪表盘 UI/UX 设计概念，看起来已达到可开发标准。

使其看起来像是一个针对高端初创公司的真实 Figma 产品设计演示。

title: 教堂前的动漫风婚礼海报
author: 趣意
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张垂直的动漫风格婚礼主视觉海报，将前景中真人 Cosplay 风格的新婚夫妇与环绕他们的动漫少女插画融为一体，背景是明媚阳光下的石砌教堂，天空呈现出绚丽的深蓝色。画面中心前景，新郎和新娘摆出类似戏剧性自拍的姿势，手臂向观众伸展。新郎是一位年轻的中性化角色，留着 浅棕色 的凌乱短发，身穿干练的白色婚礼西装、白衬衫和白色领带，面带微笑，在脸旁做出俏皮的手势。新娘留着 深紫黑色 的短双马尾，身穿华丽的白色婚纱，配有层叠蕾丝、头纱、珍珠项圈和白色长手套，手中捧着一束白玫瑰。他们身后矗立着一座美丽的欧式教堂，高耸的尖塔、入口处挂着花环、彩色玻璃窗，温暖的阳光从左侧迸发，营造出镜头光晕和闪烁的亮光。天空中飘浮着蓬松的白云，飞翔的白鸽，隐约的彩虹条纹，以及飘落的粉色花瓣。边缘处环绕着 6 位身穿深色校服、系着红或黄色蝴蝶结的动漫女学生肖像，每位都展现出不同的表情：左上角棕发女孩向前伸手，左中紫色头发戴眼罩的女孩显得局促不安，左下角粉色头发的开朗女孩，右上角棕发女孩伸出一只戴手套的手，中右侧身穿校服的黑发男孩，右下角棕发害羞女孩，以及最右下角张嘴兴奋的小金发女孩。海报四周添加华丽的装饰性边角花纹。右上角包含垂直的日语标语，文字为 さあ、契約の時間だ— 私たちの永遠を誓おう。底部中心放置一个醒目且色彩丰富的日语标题 中二病でも恋がしたい！，采用粗体蓝色和粉色描边字体，下方附有小型罗马音副标题 "Chu-2 byo demo KOI ga shitai!" 以及底部的制作人员名单 富樫勇太　小鳥遊六花。整体观感：耀眼、浪漫、感性、怀旧的动漫电影海报，超高细节，光泽感光效，魔法闪光特效，色彩鲜艳，精致的宣传构图。

Next to him on the right is {argument name="dejected person" default="Sundar Pichai"}, looking dejected and sad with his head bowed and hands clasped, wearing a plain dark grey t-shirt. They are standing indoors in front of a large glass window. Outside the window is a sunny corporate campus with trees, a small pond, and a modern glass building with the {argument name="background company logo" default="Google"} logo prominently displayed on it.

title: 梳着侧分头的凤头鹦鹉
author: 枝垂れ桜

The bird has pristine white feathers with subtle yellow tinting around the face and neck, a dark grey beak, and a sharp, clear dark eye. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the fine details of the feathers and the surreal, wispy texture of the blonde hair. The background is a {argument name="background" default="soft, out-of-focus natural environment with muted greens and greys"}, creating a shallow depth of field that keeps the focus entirely on the bird's humorous appearance.

title: 书法城市印象海报
author: 李岳
prompt: 【背景与骨架线条】 纯黑深邃底色，一条粗壮有力的墨色书法S型曲线自画面一端蜿蜒贯穿至另一端，笔触苍劲，墨迹浓淡有致，如大写意行笔，构成整幅画面的视觉骨架与叙事动线。 【主体：{argument name="主体鸟类" default="画眉鸟"}】 曲线上方，一只展翅飞翔的画眉鸟占据视觉核心；身体呈玻璃透明质感，内部映射传统建筑群叠影，蓝绿色光流在透明羽翼间流转折射，仿佛时间长河与文明记忆凝缩其中；轮廓以极细金线勾边，增强立体感与神圣感。 【中景：古典建筑序列】 燕子下方，沿墨线曲线错落分布{argument name="城市" default="广州"}的各种风景名胜：白云山、陈家祠、双子塔、广州塔、猎德大桥、海珠塔依次浮现；主色调青绿与淡金，建筑细节清晰，琉璃瓦、飞檐翘角、石阶回廊；木棉花簇拥点缀于建筑周围，花瓣随风轻散，静谧而悠远；几朵水墨云朵轻盈飘浮其间，增添空灵层次。 【前景：白鹤与水面】 前景湖畔：数只白鹤或静立水边、或振翅腾飞，姿态各异，优雅从容；浅蓝湖面如镜，倒影荡漾，波光细碎，营造宁静氛围。 【远景：山峦】 远处山峦层叠起伏，青黛色晕染，墨色由浓至淡，朦胧氤氲，富有水墨层次；与前景形成近实远虚的空间纵深。 【构图与光影】 非线性透视构图，墨线曲线为叙事主轴，古今元素沿线嵌入；光源自画面中心向外辐射扩散，形成强烈明暗对比，中心亮、四周渐暗；冷色调主导（深蓝、青绿、银白），暖色点缀（樱花粉、淡金），和谐而神秘；东方美学与现代意象交融，超现实诗意意境。 【技术规格】 8K超高清渲染，极致细节精度，最佳画质，比例 {argument name="比例" default="9:16"}

title: 戏剧性湿发肖像摄影
